javascript:(()%3D%3E%7Bvar%20Bt%3DObject.create%3Bvar%20je%3DObject.defineProperty%3Bvar%20Mt%3DObject.getOwnPropertyDescriptor%3Bvar%20Ot%3DObject.getOwnPropertyNames%3Bvar%20Ht%3DObject.getPrototypeOf%2Czt%3DObject.prototype.hasOwnProperty%3Bvar%20me%3D(e%2Ct)%3D%3E()%3D%3E(t%7C%7Ce((t%3D%7Bexports%3A%7B%7D%7D).exports%2Ct)%2Ct.exports)%3Bvar%20Gt%3D(e%2Ct%2Cr%2Ci)%3D%3E%7Bif(t%26%26typeof%20t%3D%3D%22object%22%7C%7Ctypeof%20t%3D%3D%22function%22)for(let%20n%20of%20Ot(t))!zt.call(e%2Cn)%26%26n!%3D%3Dr%26%26je(e%2Cn%2C%7Bget%3A()%3D%3Et%5Bn%5D%2Cenumerable%3A!(i%3DMt(t%2Cn))%7C%7Ci.enumerable%7D)%3Breturn%20e%7D%3Bvar%20Ut%3D(e%2Ct%2Cr)%3D%3E(r%3De!%3Dnull%3FBt(Ht(e))%3A%7B%7D%2CGt(t%7C%7C!e%7C%7C!e.__esModule%3Fje(r%2C%22default%22%2C%7Bvalue%3Ae%2Cenumerable%3A!0%7D)%3Ar%2Ce))%3Bvar%20Ye%3Dme((ni%2Cbe)%3D%3E%7Bfunction%20Ze(e%2Ct)%7Bif(t%26%26t.documentElement)e%3Dt%2Ct%3Darguments%5B2%5D%3Belse%20if(!e%7C%7C!e.documentElement)throw%20new%20Error(%22First%20argument%20to%20Readability%20constructor%20should%20be%20a%20document%20object.%22)%3Bif(t%3Dt%7C%7C%7B%7D%2Cthis._doc%3De%2Cthis._docJSDOMParser%3Dthis._doc.firstChild.__JSDOMParser__%2Cthis._articleTitle%3Dnull%2Cthis._articleByline%3Dnull%2Cthis._articleDir%3Dnull%2Cthis._articleSiteName%3Dnull%2Cthis._attempts%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis._metadata%3D%7B%7D%2Cthis._debug%3D!!t.debug%2Cthis._maxElemsToParse%3Dt.maxElemsToParse%7C%7Cthis.DEFAULT_MAX_ELEMS_TO_PARSE%2Cthis._nbTopCandidates%3Dt.nbTopCandidates%7C%7Cthis.DEFAULT_N_TOP_CANDIDATES%2Cthis._charThreshold%3Dt.charThreshold%7C%7Cthis.DEFAULT_CHAR_THRESHOLD%2Cthis._classesToPreserve%3Dthis.CLASSES_TO_PRESERVE.concat(t.classesToPreserve%7C%7C%5B%5D)%2Cthis._keepClasses%3D!!t.keepClasses%2Cthis._serializer%3Dt.serializer%7C%7Cfunction(r)%7Breturn%20r.innerHTML%7D%2Cthis._disableJSONLD%3D!!t.disableJSONLD%2Cthis._allowedVideoRegex%3Dt.allowedVideoRegex%7C%7Cthis.REGEXPS.videos%2Cthis._linkDensityModifier%3Dt.linkDensityModifier%7C%7C0%2Cthis._flags%3Dthis.FLAG_STRIP_UNLIKELYS%7Cthis.FLAG_WEIGHT_CLASSES%7Cthis.FLAG_CLEAN_CONDITIONALLY%2Cthis._debug)%7Blet%20r%3Dfunction(i)%7Bif(i.nodeType%3D%3Di.TEXT_NODE)return%60%24%7Bi.nodeName%7D%20(%22%24%7Bi.textContent%7D%22)%60%3Blet%20n%3DArray.from(i.attributes%7C%7C%5B%5D%2Cfunction(s)%7Breturn%60%24%7Bs.name%7D%3D%22%24%7Bs.value%7D%22%60%7D).join(%22%20%22)%3Breturn%60%3C%24%7Bi.localName%7D%20%24%7Bn%7D%3E%60%7D%3Bthis.log%3Dfunction()%7Bif(typeof%20console%3C%22u%22)%7Blet%20n%3DArray.from(arguments%2Cs%3D%3Es%26%26s.nodeType%3D%3Dthis.ELEMENT_NODE%3Fr(s)%3As)%3Bn.unshift(%22Reader%3A%20(Readability)%22)%2Cconsole.log(...n)%7Delse%20if(typeof%20dump%3C%22u%22)%7Bvar%20i%3DArray.prototype.map.call(arguments%2Cfunction(n)%7Breturn%20n%26%26n.nodeName%3Fr(n)%3An%7D).join(%22%20%22)%3Bdump(%22Reader%3A%20(Readability)%20%22%2Bi%2B%60%0A%60)%7D%7D%7Delse%20this.log%3Dfunction()%7B%7D%7DZe.prototype%3D%7BFLAG_STRIP_UNLIKELYS%3A1%2CFLAG_WEIGHT_CLASSES%3A2%2CFLAG_CLEAN_CONDITIONALLY%3A4%2CELEMENT_NODE%3A1%2CTEXT_NODE%3A3%2CDEFAULT_MAX_ELEMS_TO_PARSE%3A0%2CDEFAULT_N_TOP_CANDIDATES%3A5%2CDEFAULT_TAGS_TO_SCORE%3A%22section%2Ch2%2Ch3%2Ch4%2Ch5%2Ch6%2Cp%2Ctd%2Cpre%22.toUpperCase().split(%22%2C%22)%2CDEFAULT_CHAR_THRESHOLD%3A500%2CREGEXPS%3A%7BunlikelyCandidates%3A%2F-ad-%7Cai2html%7Cbanner%7Cbreadcrumbs%7Ccombx%7Ccomment%7Ccommunity%7Ccover-wrap%7Cdisqus%7Cextra%7Cfooter%7Cgdpr%7Cheader%7Clegends%7Cmenu%7Crelated%7Cremark%7Creplies%7Crss%7Cshoutbox%7Csidebar%7Cskyscraper%7Csocial%7Csponsor%7Csupplemental%7Cad-break%7Cagegate%7Cpagination%7Cpager%7Cpopup%7Cyom-remote%2Fi%2CokMaybeItsACandidate%3A%2Fand%7Carticle%7Cbody%7Ccolumn%7Ccontent%7Cmain%7Cshadow%2Fi%2Cpositive%3A%2Farticle%7Cbody%7Ccontent%7Centry%7Chentry%7Ch-entry%7Cmain%7Cpage%7Cpagination%7Cpost%7Ctext%7Cblog%7Cstory%2Fi%2Cnegative%3A%2F-ad-%7Chidden%7C%5Ehid%24%7C%20hid%24%7C%20hid%20%7C%5Ehid%20%7Cbanner%7Ccombx%7Ccomment%7Ccom-%7Ccontact%7Cfooter%7Cgdpr%7Cmasthead%7Cmedia%7Cmeta%7Coutbrain%7Cpromo%7Crelated%7Cscroll%7Cshare%7Csho cset%22)%3Bif(l%26%26a.setAttribute(%22src%22%2Ci(l))%2Ch%26%26a.setAttribute(%22poster%22%2Ci(h))%2Co)%7Bvar%20c%3Do.replace(this.REGEXPS.srcsetUrl%2Cfunction(u%2Cp%2Cd%2Cg)%7Breturn%20i(p)%2B(d%7C%7C%22%22)%2Bg%7D)%3Ba.setAttribute(%22srcset%22%2Cc)%7D%7D)%7D%2C_simplifyNestedElements(e)%7Bfor(var%20t%3De%3Bt%3B)%7Bif(t.parentNode%26%26%5B%22DIV%22%2C%22SECTION%22%5D.includes(t.tagName)%26%26!(t.id%26%26t.id.startsWith(%22readability%22)))%7Bif(this._isElementWithoutContent(t))%7Bt%3Dthis._removeAndGetNext(t)%3Bcontinue%7Delse%20if(this._hasSingleTagInsideElement(t%2C%22DIV%22)%7C%7Cthis._hasSingleTagInsideElement(t%2C%22SECTION%22))%7Bfor(var%20r%3Dt.children%5B0%5D%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Ct.attributes.length%3Bi%2B%2B)r.setAttributeNode(t.attributes%5Bi%5D.cloneNode())%3Bt.parentNode.replaceChild(r%2Ct)%2Ct%3Dr%3Bcontinue%7D%7Dt%3Dthis._getNextNode(t)%7D%7D%2C_getArticleTitle()%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis._doc%2Ct%3D%22%22%2Cr%3D%22%22%3Btry%7Bt%3Dr%3De.title.trim()%2Ctypeof%20t!%3D%22string%22%26%26(t%3Dr%3Dthis._getInnerText(e.getElementsByTagName(%22title%22)%5B0%5D))%7Dcatch%7B%7Dvar%20i%3D!1%3Bfunction%20n(c)%7Breturn%20c.split(%2F%5Cs%2B%2F).length%7Dif(%2F%20%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%20%2F.test(t))%7Bi%3D%2F%20%5B%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%20%2F.test(t)%3Blet%20c%3DArray.from(r.matchAll(%2F%20%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%20%2Fgi))%3Bt%3Dr.substring(0%2Cc.pop().index)%2Cn(t)%3C3%26%26(t%3Dr.replace(%2F%5E%5B%5E%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D*%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%2Fgi%2C%22%22))%7Delse%20if(t.includes(%22%3A%20%22))%7Bvar%20s%3Dthis._getAllNodesWithTag(e%2C%5B%22h1%22%2C%22h2%22%5D)%2Ca%3Dt.trim()%2Cl%3Dthis._someNode(s%2Cfunction(c)%7Breturn%20c.textContent.trim()%3D%3D%3Da%7D)%3Bl%7C%7C(t%3Dr.substring(r.lastIndexOf(%22%3A%22)%2B1)%2Cn(t)%3C3%3Ft%3Dr.substring(r.indexOf(%22%3A%22)%2B1)%3An(r.substr(0%2Cr.indexOf(%22%3A%22)))%3E5%26%26(t%3Dr))%7Delse%20if(t.length%3E150%7C%7Ct.length%3C15)%7Bvar%20h%3De.getElementsByTagName(%22h1%22)%3Bh.length%3D%3D%3D1%26%26(t%3Dthis._getInnerText(h%5B0%5D))%7Dt%3Dt.trim().replace(this.REGEXPS.normalize%2C%22%20%22)%3Bvar%20o%3Dn(t)%3Breturn%20o%3C%3D4%26%26(!i%7C%7Co!%3Dn(r.replace(%2F%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%2B%2Fg%2C%22%22))-1)%26%26(t%3Dr)%2Ct%7D%2C_prepDocument()%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis._doc%3Bthis._removeNodes(this._getAllNodesWithTag(e%2C%5B%22style%22%5D))%2Ce.body%26%26this._replaceBrs(e.body)%2Cthis._replaceNodeTags(this._getAllNodesWithTag(e%2C%5B%22font%22%5D)%2C%22SPAN%22)%7D%2C_nextNode(e)%7Bfor(var%20t%3De%3Bt%26%26t.nodeType!%3Dthis.ELEMENT_NODE%26%26this.REGEXPS.whitespace.test(t.textContent)%3B)t%3Dt.nextSibling%3Breturn%20t%7D%2C_replaceBrs(e)%7Bthis._forEachNode(this._getAllNodesWithTag(e%2C%5B%22br%22%5D)%2Cfunction(t)%7Bfor(var%20r%3Dt.nextSibling%2Ci%3D!1%3B(r%3Dthis._nextNode(r))%26%26r.tagName%3D%3D%22BR%22%3B)%7Bi%3D!0%3Bvar%20n%3Dr.nextSibling%3Br.remove()%2Cr%3Dn%7Dif(i)%7Bvar%20s%3Dthis._doc.createElement(%22p%22)%3Bfor(t.parentNode.replaceChild(s%2Ct)%2Cr%3Ds.nextSibling%3Br%3B)%7Bif(r.tagName%3D%3D%22BR%22)%7Bvar%20a%3Dthis._nextNode(r.nextSibling)%3Bif(a%26%26a.tagName%3D%3D%22BR%22)break%7Dif(!this._isPhrasingContent(r))break%3Bvar%20l%3Dr.nextSibling%3Bs.appendChild(r)%2Cr%3Dl%7Dfor(%3Bs.lastChild%26%26this._isWhitespace(s.lastChild)%3B)s.lastChild.remove()%3Bs.parentNode.tagName%3D%3D%3D%22P%22%26%26this._setNodeTag(s.parentNode%2C%22DIV%22)%7D%7D)%7D%2C_setNodeTag(e%2Ct)%7Bif(this.log(%22_setNodeTag%22%2Ce%2Ct)%2Cthis._docJSDOMParser)return%20e.localName%3Dt.toLowerCase()%2Ce.tagName%3Dt.toUpperCase()%2Ce%3Bfor(var%20r%3De.ownerDocument.createElement(t)%3Be.firstChild%3B)r.appendChild(e.firstChild)%3Be.parentNode.replaceChild(r%2Ce)%2Ce.readability%26%26(r.readability%3De.readability)%3Bfor(var%20i%3D0%3Bi%3Ce.attributes.length%3Bi%2B%2B)r.setAttributeNode(e.attributes%5Bi%5D.cloneNode())%3Breturn%20r%7D%2C_prepArticle(e)%7Bthis._cleanStyles(e)%2Cthis._markDataTables(e)%2Cthis._fixLazyImages(e)%2Cthis._cleanConditionally(e 20g%3Dd.nextSibling%3Bif(this._isPhrasingContent(d))p!%3D%3Dnull%3Fp.appendChild(d)%3Athis._isWhitespace(d)%7C%7C(p%3Dt.createElement(%22p%22)%2Ca.replaceChild(p%2Cd)%2Cp.appendChild(d))%3Belse%20if(p!%3D%3Dnull)%7Bfor(%3Bp.lastChild%26%26this._isWhitespace(p.lastChild)%3B)p.lastChild.remove()%3Bp%3Dnull%7Dd%3Dg%7Dif(this._hasSingleTagInsideElement(a%2C%22P%22)%26%26this._getLinkDensity(a)%3C.25)%7Bvar%20x%3Da.children%5B0%5D%3Ba.parentNode.replaceChild(x%2Ca)%2Ca%3Dx%2Cs.push(a)%7Delse%20this._hasChildBlockElement(a)%7C%7C(a%3Dthis._setNodeTag(a%2C%22P%22)%2Cs.push(a))%7Da%3Dthis._getNextNode(a)%7Dvar%20A%3D%5B%5D%3Bthis._forEachNode(s%2Cfunction(B)%7Bif(!(!B.parentNode%7C%7Ctypeof%20B.parentNode.tagName%3E%22u%22))%7Bvar%20O%3Dthis._getInnerText(B)%3Bif(!(O.length%3C25))%7Bvar%20Ve%3Dthis._getNodeAncestors(B%2C5)%3Bif(Ve.length!%3D%3D0)%7Bvar%20J%3D0%3BJ%2B%3D1%2CJ%2B%3DO.split(this.REGEXPS.commas).length%2CJ%2B%3DMath.min(Math.floor(O.length%2F100)%2C3)%2Cthis._forEachNode(Ve%2Cfunction(z%2Cfe)%7Bif(!(!z.tagName%7C%7C!z.parentNode%7C%7Ctypeof%20z.parentNode.tagName%3E%22u%22))%7Bif(typeof%20z.readability%3E%22u%22%26%26(this._initializeNode(z)%2CA.push(z))%2Cfe%3D%3D%3D0)var%20de%3D1%3Belse%20fe%3D%3D%3D1%3Fde%3D2%3Ade%3Dfe*3%3Bz.readability.contentScore%2B%3DJ%2Fde%7D%7D)%7D%7D%7D%7D)%3Bfor(var%20E%3D%5B%5D%2CL%3D0%2CP%3DA.length%3BL%3CP%3BL%2B%3D1)%7Bvar%20_%3DA%5BL%5D%2CC%3D_.readability.contentScore*(1-this._getLinkDensity(_))%3B_.readability.contentScore%3DC%2Cthis.log(%22Candidate%3A%22%2C_%2C%22with%20score%20%22%2BC)%3Bfor(var%20y%3D0%3By%3Cthis._nbTopCandidates%3By%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20S%3DE%5By%5D%3Bif(!S%7C%7CC%3ES.readability.contentScore)%7BE.splice(y%2C0%2C_)%2CE.length%3Ethis._nbTopCandidates%26%26E.pop()%3Bbreak%7D%7D%7Dvar%20f%3DE%5B0%5D%7C%7Cnull%2CM%3D!1%2Cm%3Bif(f%3D%3D%3Dnull%7C%7Cf.tagName%3D%3D%3D%22BODY%22)%7Bfor(f%3Dt.createElement(%22DIV%22)%2CM%3D!0%3Be.firstChild%3B)this.log(%22Moving%20child%20out%3A%22%2Ce.firstChild)%2Cf.appendChild(e.fir )%3A!1%7D)()%3Bif(n%26%26f)%7Bfor(var%20M%3D0%3BM%3Cr.children.length%3BM%2B%2B)if(r.children%5BM%5D.children.length%3E1)return%20f%3Blet%20w%3Dr.getElementsByTagName(%22li%22).length%3Bif(c%3D%3Dw)return!1%7Dreturn%20f%7Dreturn!1%7D)%7D%2C_cleanMatchedNodes(e%2Ct)%7Bfor(var%20r%3Dthis._getNextNode(e%2C!0)%2Ci%3Dthis._getNextNode(e)%3Bi%26%26i!%3Dr%3B)t.call(this%2Ci%2Ci.className%2B%22%20%22%2Bi.id)%3Fi%3Dthis._removeAndGetNext(i)%3Ai%3Dthis._getNextNode(i)%7D%2C_cleanHeaders(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis._getAllNodesWithTag(e%2C%5B%22h1%22%2C%22h2%22%5D)%3Bthis._removeNodes(t%2Cfunction(r)%7Blet%20i%3Dthis._getClassWeight(r)%3C0%3Breturn%20i%26%26this.log(%22Removing%20header%20with%20low%20class%20weight%3A%22%2Cr)%2Ci%7D)%7D%2C_headerDuplicatesTitle(e)%7Bif(e.tagName!%3D%22H1%22%26%26e.tagName!%3D%22H2%22)return!1%3Bvar%20t%3Dthis._getInnerText(e%2C!1)%3Breturn%20this.log(%22Evaluating%20similarity%20of%20header%3A%22%2Ct%2Cthis._articleTitle)%2Cthis._textSimilarity(this._articleTitle%2Ct)%3E.75%7D%2C_flagIsActive(e)%7Breturn(this._flags%26e)%3E0%7D%2C_removeFlag(e)%7Bthis._flags%3Dthis._flags%26~e%7D%2C_isProbablyVisible(e)%7Breturn(!e.style%7C%7Ce.style.display!%3D%22none%22)%26%26(!e.style%7C%7Ce.style.visibility!%3D%22hidden%22)%26%26!e.hasAttribute(%22hidden%22)%26%26(!e.hasAttribute(%22aria-hidden%22)%7C%7Ce.getAttribute(%22aria-hidden%22)!%3D%22true%22%7C%7Ce.className%26%26e.className.includes%26%26e.className.includes(%22fallback-image%22))%7D%2Cparse()%7Bif(this._maxElemsToParse%3E0)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis._doc.getElementsByTagName(%22*%22).length%3Bif(e%3Ethis._maxElemsToParse)throw%20new%20Error(%22Aborting%20parsing%20document%3B%20%22%2Be%2B%22%20elements%20found%22)%7Dthis._unwrapNoscriptImages(this._doc)%3Bvar%20t%3Dthis._disableJSONLD%3F%7B%7D%3Athis._getJSONLD(this._doc)%3Bthis._removeScripts(this._doc)%2Cthis._prepDocument()%3Bvar%20r%3Dthis._getArticleMetadata(t)%3Bthis._metadata%3Dr%2Cthis._articleTitle%3Dr.title%3Bvar%20i%3Dthis._grabArticle()%3Bif(!i)retu return!0%7Delse%20if(typeof%20i%3D%3D%22function%22)%7Bif(i.call(e%2Ct%2Cr))return!0%7Delse%20throw%20new%20TypeError(%22%60filter%60%20needs%20to%20be%20a%20string%2C%20array%2C%20or%20function%22)%7Dfunction%20er(e)%7Bvar%20t%3De.element%2Cr%3De.isBlock%2Ci%3De.isVoid%2Cn%3De.isPre%7C%7Cfunction(u)%7Breturn%20u.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22PRE%22%7D%3Bif(!(!t.firstChild%7C%7Cn(t)))%7Bfor(var%20s%3Dnull%2Ca%3D!1%2Cl%3Dnull%2Ch%3Dtt(l%2Ct%2Cn)%3Bh!%3D%3Dt%3B)%7Bif(h.nodeType%3D%3D%3D3%7C%7Ch.nodeType%3D%3D%3D4)%7Bvar%20o%3Dh.data.replace(%2F%5B%20%5Cr%5Cn%5Ct%5D%2B%2Fg%2C%22%20%22)%3Bif((!s%7C%7C%2F%20%24%2F.test(s.data))%26%26!a%26%26o%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%20%22%26%26(o%3Do.substr(1))%2C!o)%7Bh%3D_e(h)%3Bcontinue%7Dh.data%3Do%2Cs%3Dh%7Delse%20if(h.nodeType%3D%3D%3D1)r(h)%7C%7Ch.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22BR%22%3F(s%26%26(s.data%3Ds.data.replace(%2F%20%24%2F%2C%22%22))%2Cs%3Dnull%2Ca%3D!1)%3Ai(h)%7C%7Cn(h)%3F(s%3Dnull%2Ca%3D!0)%3As%26%26(a%3D!1)%3Belse%7Bh%3D_e(h)%3Bcontinue%7Dvar%20c%3Dtt(l%2Ch%2Cn)%3Bl%3Dh%2Ch%3Dc%7Ds%26%26(s.data%3Ds.data.replace(%2F%20%24%2F%2C%22%22)%2Cs.data%7C%7C_e(s))%7D%7Dfunction%20_e(e)%7Bvar%20t%3De.nextSibling%7C%7Ce.parentNode%3Breturn%20e.parentNode.removeChild(e)%2Ct%7Dfunction%20tt(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Breturn%20e%26%26e.parentNode%3D%3D%3Dt%7C%7Cr(t)%3Ft.nextSibling%7C%7Ct.parentNode%3At.firstChild%7C%7Ct.nextSibling%7C%7Ct.parentNode%7Dvar%20Ae%3Dtypeof%20window%3C%22u%22%3Fwindow%3A%7B%7D%3Bfunction%20tr()%7Bvar%20e%3DAe.DOMParser%2Ct%3D!1%3Btry%7Bnew%20e().parseFromString(%22%22%2C%22text%2Fhtml%22)%26%26(t%3D!0)%7Dcatch%7B%7Dreturn%20t%7Dfunction%20rr()%7Bvar%20e%3Dfunction()%7B%7D%3Breturn%20ir()%3Fe.prototype.parseFromString%3Dfunction(t)%7Bvar%20r%3Dnew%20window.ActiveXObject(%22htmlfile%22)%3Breturn%20r.designMode%3D%22on%22%2Cr.open()%2Cr.write(t)%2Cr.close()%2Cr%7D%3Ae.prototype.parseFromString%3Dfunction(t)%7Bvar%20r%3Ddocument.implementation.createHTMLDocument(%22%22)%3Breturn%20r.open()%2Cr.write(t)%2Cr.close()%2Cr%7D%2Ce%7Dfunction%20ir()%7Bvar%20e%3D!1%3Btry%7Bdocument.implementation.createHTMLDocument(%22%22).open()%7Dcatch%7BAe.ActiveXObject%26%26(e%3D!0)%7Dreturn%20e%7Dvar%20nr%3Dtr()%3FAe.DOMParser%3Arr()%3Bfunction%20sr(e%2Ct)%7Bvar%20r%3Bif(typeof%20e%3D%3D%22string%22)%7Bvar%20i%3Dar().parseFromString('%3Cx-turndown%20id%3D%22turndown-root%22%3E'%2Be%2B%22%3C%2Fx-turndown%3E%22%2C%22text%2Fhtml%22)%3Br%3Di.getElementById(%22turndown-root%22)%7Delse%20r%3De.cloneNode(!0)%3Breturn%20er(%7Belement%3Ar%2CisBlock%3AEe%2CisVoid%3Alt%2CisPre%3At.preformattedCode%3Flr%3Anull%7D)%2Cr%7Dvar%20ye%3Bfunction%20ar()%7Breturn%20ye%3Dye%7C%7Cnew%20nr%2Cye%7Dfunction%20lr(e)%7Breturn%20e.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22PRE%22%7C%7Ce.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22CODE%22%7Dfunction%20or(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20e.isBlock%3DEe(e)%2Ce.isCode%3De.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22CODE%22%7C%7Ce.parentNode.isCode%2Ce.isBlank%3Dhr(e)%2Ce.flankingWhitespace%3Dcr(e%2Ct)%2Ce%7Dfunction%20hr(e)%7Breturn!lt(e)%26%26!Yt(e)%26%26%2F%5E%5Cs*%24%2Fi.test(e.textContent)%26%26!Zt(e)%26%26!Qt(e)%7Dfunction%20cr(e%2Ct)%7Bif(e.isBlock%7C%7Ct.preformattedCode%26%26e.isCode)return%7Bleading%3A%22%22%2Ctrailing%3A%22%22%7D%3Bvar%20r%3Dur(e.textContent)%3Breturn%20r.leadingAscii%26%26rt(%22left%22%2Ce%2Ct)%26%26(r.leading%3Dr.leadingNonAscii)%2Cr.trailingAscii%26%26rt(%22right%22%2Ce%2Ct)%26%26(r.trailing%3Dr.trailingNonAscii)%2C%7Bleading%3Ar.leading%2Ctrailing%3Ar.trailing%7D%7Dfunction%20ur(e)%7Bvar%20t%3De.match(%2F%5E((%5B%20%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5D*)(%5Cs*))(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%5CS)%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%5CS)%3F((%5Cs*%3F)(%5B%20%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5D*))%24%2F)%3Breturn%7Bleading%3At%5B1%5D%2CleadingAscii%3At%5B2%5D%2CleadingNonAscii%3At%5B3%5D%2Ctrailing%3At%5B4%5D%2CtrailingNonAscii%3At%5B5%5D%2CtrailingAscii%3At%5B6%5D%7D%7Dfunction%20rt(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Bvar%20i%2Cn%2Cs%3Breturn%20e%3D%3D%3D%22left%22%3F(i%3Dt.previousSibling%2Cn%3D%2F%20%24%2F)%3A(i%3Dt.nextSibling%2Cn%3D%2F%5E%20%2F)%2Ci%26%26(i.nodeType%3D%3D%3D3%3Fs%3Dn.test(i.nodeValue)%3Ar.preformattedCode%26%26i.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22CODE%22%3Fs%3 ction%20gr(e)%7Bvar%20t%3Dthis%3Breturn%20this.rules.forEach(function(r)%7Btypeof%20r.append%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26(e%3Dgt(e%2Cr.append(t.options)))%7D)%2Ce.replace(%2F%5E%5B%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5D%2B%2F%2C%22%22).replace(%2F%5B%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5Cs%5D%2B%24%2F%2C%22%22)%7Dfunction%20fr(e)%7Bvar%20t%3Dthis.rules.forNode(e)%2Cr%3Dpt.call(this%2Ce)%2Ci%3De.flankingWhitespace%3Breturn(i.leading%7C%7Ci.trailing)%26%26(r%3Dr.trim())%2Ci.leading%2Bt.replacement(r%2Ce%2Cthis.options)%2Bi.trailing%7Dfunction%20gt(e%2Ct)%7Bvar%20r%3Dnt(e)%2Ci%3Dit(t)%2Cn%3DMath.max(e.length-r.length%2Ct.length-i.length)%2Cs%3D%60%0A%0A%60.substring(0%2Cn)%3Breturn%20r%2Bs%2Bi%7Dfunction%20dr(e)%7Breturn%20e!%3Dnull%26%26(typeof%20e%3D%3D%22string%22%7C%7Ce.nodeType%26%26(e.nodeType%3D%3D%3D1%7C%7Ce.nodeType%3D%3D%3D9%7C%7Ce.nodeType%3D%3D%3D11))%7Dfunction%20Pe()%7Breturn%7Basync%3A!1%2Cbreaks%3A!1%2Cextensions%3Anull%2Cgfm%3A!0%2Chooks%3Anull%2Cpedantic%3A!1%2Crenderer%3Anull%2Csilent%3A!1%2Ctokenizer%3Anull%2CwalkTokens%3Anull%7D%7Dvar%20W%3DPe()%3Bfunction%20yt(e)%7BW%3De%7Dvar%20G%3D%7Bexec%3A()%3D%3Enull%7D%3Bfunction%20b(e%2Ct%3D%22%22)%7Blet%20r%3Dtypeof%20e%3D%3D%22string%22%3Fe%3Ae.source%2Ci%3D%7Breplace%3A(n%2Cs)%3D%3E%7Blet%20a%3Dtypeof%20s%3D%3D%22string%22%3Fs%3As.source%3Breturn%20a%3Da.replace(N.caret%2C%22%241%22)%2Cr%3Dr.replace(n%2Ca)%2Ci%7D%2CgetRegex%3A()%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(r%2Ct)%7D%3Breturn%20i%7Dvar%20mr%3D((e%3D%22%22)%3D%3E%7Btry%7Breturn!!new%20RegExp(%22(%3F%3C%3D1)(%3F%3C!1)%22%2Be)%7Dcatch%7Breturn!1%7D%7D)()%2CN%3D%7BcodeRemoveIndent%3A%2F%5E(%3F%3A%20%7B1%2C4%7D%7C%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5Ct)%2Fgm%2CoutputLinkReplace%3A%2F%5C%5C(%5B%5C%5B%5C%5D%5D)%2Fg%2CindentCodeCompensation%3A%2F%5E(%5Cs%2B)(%3F%3A%60%60%60)%2F%2CbeginningSpace%3A%2F%5E%5Cs%2B%2F%2CendingHash%3A%2F%23%24%2F%2CstartingSpaceChar%3A%2F%5E%20%2F%2CendingSpaceChar%3A%2F%20%24%2F%2CnonSpaceChar%3A%2F%5B%5E%20%5D%2F%2CnewLineCharGlobal%3A%2F%5Cn%2Fg%2CtabCharGlobal%3A%2F%5Ct%2Fg%2CmultipleSpaceGlobal%3A%2F%5Cs%2B%2Fg%2CblankLine%3A%2F%5E%5B%20%5Ct%5D*%24%2F%2CdoubleBlankLine%3A%2F%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*%24%2F%2CblockquoteStart%3A%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%2F%2CblockquoteSetextReplace%3A%2F%5Cn%20%7B0%2C3%7D((%3F%3A%3D%2B%7C-%2B)%20*)(%3F%3D%5Cn%7C%24)%2Fg%2CblockquoteSetextReplace2%3A%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%5B%20%5Ct%5D%3F%2Fgm%2ClistReplaceNesting%3A%2F%5E%20%7B1%2C4%7D(%3F%3D(%20%7B4%7D)*%5B%5E%20%5D)%2Fg%2ClistIsTask%3A%2F%5E%5C%5B%5B%20xX%5D%5C%5D%20%2B%5CS%2F%2ClistReplaceTask%3A%2F%5E%5C%5B%5B%20xX%5D%5C%5D%20%2B%2F%2ClistTaskCheckbox%3A%2F%5C%5B%5B%20xX%5D%5C%5D%2F%2CanyLine%3A%2F%5Cn.*%5Cn%2F%2ChrefBrackets%3A%2F%5E%3C(.*)%3E%24%2F%2CtableDelimiter%3A%2F%5B%3A%7C%5D%2F%2CtableAlignChars%3A%2F%5E%5C%7C%7C%5C%7C%20*%24%2Fg%2CtableRowBlankLine%3A%2F%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*%24%2F%2CtableAlignRight%3A%2F%5E%20*-%2B%3A%20*%24%2F%2CtableAlignCenter%3A%2F%5E%20*%3A-%2B%3A%20*%24%2F%2CtableAlignLeft%3A%2F%5E%20*%3A-%2B%20*%24%2F%2CstartATag%3A%2F%5E%3Ca%20%2Fi%2CendATag%3A%2F%5E%3C%5C%2Fa%3E%2Fi%2CstartPreScriptTag%3A%2F%5E%3C(pre%7Ccode%7Ckbd%7Cscript)(%5Cs%7C%3E)%2Fi%2CendPreScriptTag%3A%2F%5E%3C%5C%2F(pre%7Ccode%7Ckbd%7Cscript)(%5Cs%7C%3E)%2Fi%2CstartAngleBracket%3A%2F%5E%3C%2F%2CendAngleBracket%3A%2F%3E%24%2F%2CpedanticHrefTitle%3A%2F%5E(%5B%5E'%22%5D*%5B%5E%5Cs%5D)%5Cs%2B(%5B'%22%5D)(.*)%5C2%2F%2CunicodeAlphaNumeric%3A%2F%5B%5Cp%7BL%7D%5Cp%7BN%7D%5D%2Fu%2CescapeTest%3A%2F%5B%26%3C%3E%22'%5D%2F%2CescapeReplace%3A%2F%5B%26%3C%3E%22'%5D%2Fg%2CescapeTestNoEncode%3A%2F%5B%3C%3E%22'%5D%7C%26(%3F!(%23%5Cd%7B1%2C7%7D%7C%23%5BXx%5D%5Ba-fA-F0-9%5D%7B1%2C6%7D%7C%5Cw%2B)%3B)%2F%2CescapeReplaceNoEncode%3A%2F%5B%3C%3E%22'%5D%7C%26(%3F!(%23%5Cd%7B1%2C7%7D%7C%23%5BXx%5D%5Ba-fA-F0-9%5D%7B1%2C6%7D%7C%5Cw%2B)%3B)%2Fg%2Ccaret%3A%2F(%5E%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5D)%5C%5E%2Fg%2CpercentDecode%3A%2F%2525%2Fg%2CfindPipe%3A%2F%5C%7C%2Fg%2CsplitPipe%3A%2F%20%5C%7C%2F%2CslashPipe%3A%2F%5C%5C%5C%7C%2Fg%2CcarriageReturn%3A%2F%5Cr%5Cn%7C%5Cr%2Fg%2CspaceLine%3A%2F%5E%20%2B%24%2Fgm%2CnotSpaceStart%3A%2F%5E%5CS*%2F%2CendingNewline%3A%2F%5Cn%24%2F%2ClistItemRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E(%20%7B0%2C3%7D%24%7Be%7D)((%3F%3A%5B%09%20%5D%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*)%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%60)%2CnextBulletRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Ce-1)%7D%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C%5C%5Cd%7B1%2C9%7D%5B.)%5D)((%3F%3A%5B%20%09%5D%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*)%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%60)%2ChrRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Ce-1)%7D%7D((%3F%3A-%20*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A_%20*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A%5C%5C*%20*)%7B3%2C%7D)(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%60)%2CfencesBeginRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Ce-1)%7D%7D(%3F%3A%5C%60%5C%60%5C%60%7C~~~)%60)%2CheadingBeginRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Ce-1)%7D%7D%23%60)%2ChtmlBeginRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Ce-1)%7D%7D%3C(%3F%3A%5Ba-z%5D.*%3E%7C!--)%60%2C%22i%22)%2CblockquoteBeginRegex%3Ae%3D%3Enew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Ce-1)%7D%7D%3E%60)%7D%2Cbr%3D%2F%5E(%3F%3A%5B%20%5Ct%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))%2B%2F%2Ckr%3D%2F%5E((%3F%3A%20%7B4%7D%7C%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5Ct)%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn(%3F%3A%5B%20%5Ct%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))*)%3F)%2B%2F%2Cxr%3D%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5Cn%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)(%5B%5E%5Cn%5D*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24)(%3F%3A%7C(%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F)(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))(%3F%3A%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5C1%5B~%60%5D*%20*(%3F%3D%5Cn%7C%24)%7C%24)%2F%2CY%3D%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D((%3F%3A-%5B%5Ct%20%5D*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A_%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A%5C*%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%7B3%2C%7D)(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2C_r%3D%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%23%7B1%2C6%7D)(%3F%3D%5Cs%7C%24)(.*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2CCe%3D%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C%5Cd%7B1%2C9%7D%5B.)%5D)%2F%2Cvt%3D%2F%5E(%3F!bull%20%7CblockCode%7Cfences%7Cblockquote%7Cheading%7Chtml%7Ctable)((%3F%3A.%7C%5Cn(%3F!%5Cs*%3F%5Cn%7Cbull%20%7CblockCode%7Cfences%7Cblockquote%7Cheading%7Chtml%7Ctable))%2B%3F)%5Cn%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3D%2B%7C-%2B)%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2CEt%3Db(vt).replace(%2Fbull%2Fg%2CCe).replace(%2FblockCode%2Fg%2C%2F(%3F%3A%20%7B4%7D%7C%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5Ct)%2F).replace(%2Ffences%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%2F).replace(%2Fblockquote%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%2F).replace(%2Fheading%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D%2F).replace(%2Fhtml%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3C%5B%5E%5Cn%3E%5D%2B%3E%5Cn%2F).replace(%2F%5C%7Ctable%2Fg%2C%22%22).getRegex()%2Cyr%3Db(vt).replace(%2Fbull%2Fg%2CCe).replace(%2FblockCode%2Fg%2C%2F(%3F%3A%20%7B4%7D%7C%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5Ct)%2F).replace(%2Ffences%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%2F).replace(%2Fblockquote%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%2F).replace(%2Fheading%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D%2F).replace(%2Fhtml%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3C%5B%5E%5Cn%3E%5D%2B%3E%5Cn%2F).replace(%2Ftable%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5C%7C%3F(%3F%3A%5B%3A%5C-%20%5D*%5C%7C)%2B%5B%5C%3A%5C-%20%5D*%5Cn%2F).getRegex()%2CIe%3D%2F%5E(%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn(%3F!hr%7Cheading%7Clheading%7Cblockquote%7Cfences%7Clist%7Chtml%7Ctable%7C%20%2B%5Cn)%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B)*)%2F%2Cvr%3D%2F%5E%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B%2F%2CDe%3D%2F(%3F!%5Cs*%5C%5D)(%3F%3A%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D)%2B%2F%2CEr%3Db(%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%3A%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%3F(%5B%5E%3C%5Cs%5D%5B%5E%5Cs%5D*%7C%3C.*%3F%3E)(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%20%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%3F%7C%20*%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)(title))%3F%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F).replace(%22label%22%2CDe).replace(%22title%22%2C%2F(%3F%3A%22(%3F%3A%5C%5C%22%3F%7C%5B%5E%22%5C%5C%5D)*%22%7C'%5B%5E'%5Cn%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cn%5B%5E'%5Cn%5D%2B)*%5Cn%3F'%7C%5C(%5B%5E()%5D*%5C))%2F).getRegex()%2Cwr%3Db(%2F%5E(bull)(%5B%20%5Ct%5D%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B%3F)%3F(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24)%2F).replace(%2Fbull%2Fg%2CCe).getRegex()%2Cse%3D%22address%7Carticle%7Caside%7Cbase%7Cbasefont%7Cblockquote%7Cbody%7Ccaption%7Ccenter%7Ccol%7Ccolgroup%7Cdd%7Cdetails%7Cdialog%7Cdir%7Cdiv%7Cdl%7Cdt%7Cfieldset%7Cfigcaption%7Cfigure%7Cfooter%7Cform%7Cframe%7Cframeset%7Ch%5B1-6%5D%7Chead%7Cheader%7Chr%7Chtml%7Ciframe%7Clegend%7Cli%7Clink%7Cmain%7Cmenu%7Cmenuitem%7Cmeta%7Cnav%7Cnoframes%7Col%7Coptgroup%7Coption%7Cp%7Cparam%7Csearch%7Csection%7Csummary%7Ctable%7Ctbody%7Ctd%7Ctfoot%7Cth%7Cthead%7Ctitle%7Ctr%7Ctrack%7Cul%22%2C%24e%3D%2F%3C!--(%3F%3A-%3F%3E%7C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A--%3E%7C%24))%2F%2CTr%3Db(%22%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%3C(script%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea)%5B%5C%5Cs%3E%5D%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%3C%2F%5C%5C1%3E%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%7Ccomment%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*(%5C%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%7C%3C%5C%5C%3F%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5C%3F%3E%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%7C%3C!%5BA-Z%5D%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%3E%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%7C%3C!%5C%5C%5BCDATA%5C%5C%5B%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D%3E%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%7C%3C%2F%3F(tag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%5B%20%09%5D*)%2B%5C%5Cn%7C%24)%7C%3C(%3F!script%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea)(%5Ba-z%5D%5B%5C%5Cw-%5D*)(%3F%3Aattribute)*%3F%20*%2F%3F%3E(%3F%3D%5B%20%5C%5Ct%5D*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%5B%20%09%5D*)%2B%5C%5Cn%7C%24)%7C%3C%2F(%3F!script%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea)%5Ba-z%5D%5B%5C%5Cw-%5D*%5C%5Cs*%3E(%3F%3D%5B%20%5C%5Ct%5D*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%5B%20%09%5D*)%2B%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%22%2C%22i%22).replace(%22comment%22%2C%24e).replace(%22tag%22%2Cse).replace(%22attribute%22%2C%2F%20%2B%5Ba-zA-Z%3A_%5D%5B%5Cw.%3A-%5D*(%3F%3A%20*%3D%20*%22%5B%5E%22%5Cn%5D*%22%7C%20*%3D%20*'%5B%5E'%5Cn%5D*'%7C%20*%3D%20*%5B%5E%5Cs%22'%3D%3C%3E%60%5D%2B)%3F%2F).getRegex()%2Cwt%3Db(Ie).replace(%22hr%22%2CY).replace(%22heading%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D(%3F%3A%5C%5Cs%7C%24)%22).replace(%22%7Clheading%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22%7Ctable%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22fences%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn)%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%22list%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C1%5B.)%5D)%5B%20%5C%5Ct%5D%22).replace(%22html%22%2C%22%3C%2F%3F(%3F%3Atag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%7C%3C(%3F%3Ascript%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea%7C!--)%22).replace(%22tag%22%2Cse).getRegex()%2CNr%3Db(%2F%5E(%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%20%3F(paragraph%7C%5B%5E%5Cn%5D*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))%2B%2F).replace(%22paragraph%22%2Cwt).getRegex()%2CBe%3D%7Bblockquote%3ANr%2Ccode%3Akr%2Cdef%3AEr%2Cfences%3Axr%2Cheading%3A_r%2Chr%3AY%2Chtml%3ATr%2Clheading%3AEt%2Clist%3Awr%2Cnewline%3Abr%2Cparagraph%3Awt%2Ctable%3AG%2Ctext%3Avr%7D%2Cft%3Db(%22%5E%20*(%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%20%5D.*)%5C%5Cn%20%7B0%2C3%7D((%3F%3A%5C%5C%7C%20*)%3F%3A%3F-%2B%3A%3F%20*(%3F%3A%5C%5C%7C%20*%3A%3F-%2B%3A%3F%20*)*(%3F%3A%5C%5C%7C%20*)%3F)(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn((%3F%3A(%3F!%20*%5C%5Cn%7Chr%7Cheading%7Cblockquote%7Ccode%7Cfences%7Clist%7Chtml).*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))*)%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%22).replace(%22hr%22%2CY).replace(%22heading%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D(%3F%3A%5C%5Cs%7C%24)%22).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22code%22%2C%22(%3F%3A%20%7B4%7D%7C%20%7B0%2C3%7D%09)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D%22).replace(%22fences%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn)%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%22list%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C1%5B.)%5D)%5B%20%5C%5Ct%5D%22).replace(%22html%22%2C%22%3C%2F%3F(%3F%3Atag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%7C%3C(%3F%3Ascript%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea%7C!--)%22).replace(%22tag%22%2Cse).getRegex()%2CAr%3D%7B...Be%2Clheading%3Ayr%2Ctable%3Aft%2Cparagraph%3Ab(Ie).replace(%22hr%22%2CY).replace(%22heading%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D(%3F%3A%5C%5Cs%7C%24)%22).replace(%22%7Clheading%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22table%22%2Cft).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22fences%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn)%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%22li F%3D%5B%5C%5C%3C!%5C%5B%60*_%5D%7C%5Cb_%7C%24)%7C%5B%5E%20%5D(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)))%2F%2CF%3D%2F%5B%5Cp%7BP%7D%5Cp%7BS%7D%5D%2Fu%2Cae%3D%2F%5B%5Cs%5Cp%7BP%7D%5Cp%7BS%7D%5D%2Fu%2CMe%3D%2F%5B%5E%5Cs%5Cp%7BP%7D%5Cp%7BS%7D%5D%2Fu%2CCr%3Db(%2F%5E((%3F!%5B*_%5D)punctSpace)%2F%2C%22u%22).replace(%2FpunctSpace%2Fg%2Cae).getRegex()%2CNt%3D%2F(%3F!~)%5B%5Cp%7BP%7D%5Cp%7BS%7D%5D%2Fu%2CIr%3D%2F(%3F!~)%5B%5Cs%5Cp%7BP%7D%5Cp%7BS%7D%5D%2Fu%2CDr%3D%2F(%3F%3A%5B%5E%5Cs%5Cp%7BP%7D%5Cp%7BS%7D%5D%7C~)%2Fu%2C%24r%3Db(%2Flink%7Cprecode-code%7Chtml%2F%2C%22g%22).replace(%22link%22%2C%2F%5C%5B(%3F%3A%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%60%5D%7C(%3F%3Ca%3E%60%2B)%5B%5E%60%5D%2B%5Ck%3Ca%3E(%3F!%60))*%3F%5C%5D%5C((%3F%3A%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%5B%5E%5C%5C%5C(%5C)%5D%7C%5C((%3F%3A%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%5B%5E%5C%5C%5C(%5C)%5D)*%5C))*%5C)%2F).replace(%22precode-%22%2Cmr%3F%22(%3F%3C!%60)()%22%3A%22(%5E%5E%7C%5B%5E%60%5D)%22).replace(%22code%22%2C%2F(%3F%3Cb%3E%60%2B)%5B%5E%60%5D%2B%5Ck%3Cb%3E(%3F!%60)%2F).replace(%22html%22%2C%2F%3C(%3F!%20)%5B%5E%3C%3E%5D*%3F%3E%2F).getRegex()%2CAt%3D%2F%5E(%3F%3A%5C*%2B(%3F%3A((%3F!%5C*)punct)%7C(%5B%5E%5Cs*%5D))%3F)%7C%5E_%2B(%3F%3A((%3F!_)punct)%7C(%5B%5E%5Cs_%5D))%3F%2F%2CBr%3Db(At%2C%22u%22).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CF).getRegex()%2CMr%3Db(At%2C%22u%22).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CNt).getRegex()%2CSt%3D%22%5E%5B%5E_*%5D*%3F__%5B%5E_*%5D*%3F%5C%5C*%5B%5E_*%5D*%3F(%3F%3D__)%7C%5B%5E*%5D%2B(%3F%3D%5B%5E*%5D)%7C(%3F!%5C%5C*)punct(%5C%5C*%2B)(%3F%3D%5B%5C%5Cs%5D%7C%24)%7CnotPunctSpace(%5C%5C*%2B)(%3F!%5C%5C*)(%3F%3DpunctSpace%7C%24)%7C(%3F!%5C%5C*)punctSpace(%5C%5C*%2B)(%3F%3DnotPunctSpace)%7C%5B%5C%5Cs%5D(%5C%5C*%2B)(%3F!%5C%5C*)(%3F%3Dpunct)%7C(%3F!%5C%5C*)punct(%5C%5C*%2B)(%3F!%5C%5C*)(%3F%3Dpunct)%7CnotPunctSpace(%5C%5C*%2B)(%3F%3DnotPunctSpace)%22%2COr%3Db(St%2C%22gu%22).replace(%2FnotPunctSpace%2Fg%2CMe).replace(%2FpunctSpace%2Fg%2Cae).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CF).getRegex()%2CHr%3Db(St%2C%22gu%22).replace(%2FnotPunctSpace%2Fg%2CDr).replace(%2FpunctSpace%2Fg%2CIr).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CNt).getRegex()%2Czr%3Db(%22%5E%5B%5E_*%5D*%3F%5C%5C*%5C%5C*%5B%5E_*%5D*%3F_%5B%5E_*%5D*%3F(%3F%3D%5C%5C*%5C%5C*)%7C%5B%5E_%5D%2B(%3F%3D%5B%5E_%5D)%7C(%3F!_)punct(_%2B)(%3F%3D%5B%5C%5Cs%5D%7C%24)%7CnotPunctSpace(_%2B)(%3F!_)(%3F%3DpunctSpace%7C%24)%7C(%3F!_)punctSpace(_%2B)(%3F%3DnotPunctSpace)%7C%5B%5C%5Cs%5D(_%2B)(%3F!_)(%3F%3Dpunct)%7C(%3F!_)punct(_%2B)(%3F!_)(%3F%3Dpunct)%22%2C%22gu%22).replace(%2FnotPunctSpace%2Fg%2CMe).replace(%2FpunctSpace%2Fg%2Cae).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CF).getRegex()%2CGr%3Db(%2F%5E~~%3F(%3F%3A((%3F!~)punct)%7C%5B%5E%5Cs~%5D)%2F%2C%22u%22).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CF).getRegex()%2CUr%3D%22%5E%5B%5E~%5D%2B(%3F%3D%5B%5E~%5D)%7C(%3F!~)punct(~~%3F)(%3F%3D%5B%5C%5Cs%5D%7C%24)%7CnotPunctSpace(~~%3F)(%3F!~)(%3F%3DpunctSpace%7C%24)%7C(%3F!~)punctSpace(~~%3F)(%3F%3DnotPunctSpace)%7C%5B%5C%5Cs%5D(~~%3F)(%3F!~)(%3F%3Dpunct)%7C(%3F!~)punct(~~%3F)(%3F!~)(%3F%3Dpunct)%7CnotPunctSpace(~~%3F)(%3F%3DnotPunctSpace)%22%2CWr%3Db(Ur%2C%22gu%22).replace(%2FnotPunctSpace%2Fg%2CMe).replace(%2FpunctSpace%2Fg%2Cae).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CF).getRegex()%2CFr%3Db(%2F%5C%5C(punct)%2F%2C%22gu%22).replace(%2Fpunct%2Fg%2CF).getRegex()%2Cqr%3Db(%2F%5E%3C(scheme%3A%5B%5E%5Cs%5Cx00-%5Cx1f%3C%3E%5D*%7Cemail)%3E%2F).replace(%22scheme%22%2C%2F%5Ba-zA-Z%5D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%2B.-%5D%7B1%2C31%7D%2F).replace(%22email%22%2C%2F%5Ba-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%2F%3D%3F%5E_%60%7B%7C%7D~-%5D%2B(%40)%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D(%3F%3A%5Ba-zA-Z0-9-%5D%7B0%2C61%7D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D)%3F(%3F%3A%5C.%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D(%3F%3A%5Ba-zA-Z0-9-%5D%7B0%2C61%7D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D)%3F)%2B(%3F!%5B-_%5D)%2F).getRegex()%2CXr%3Db(%24e).replace(%22(%3F%3A--%3E%7C%24)%22%2C%22--%3E%22).getRegex()%2CVr%3Db(%22%5Ecomment%7C%5E%3C%2F%5Ba-zA-Z%5D%5B%5C%5Cw%3A-%5D*%5C%5Cs*%3E%7C%5E%3C%5Ba-zA-Z%5D%5B%5C%5Cw-%5D*(%3F%3Aattribute)*%3F%5C%5Cs*%2F%3F%3E%7C%5E%3C%5C%5C%3F%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F%5C%5C%3F%3E%7C%5E%3C!%5Ba-zA-Z%5D%2B%5C%5Cs%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F%3E%7C%5E%3C!%5C%5C%5BCDATA%5C%5C%5B%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F%5C%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D%3E%22).replace(%22comment%22%2CXr).replace(%22attribute%22%2C%2F%5Cs%2B%5Ba-zA-Z%3A_%5D%5B%5Cw.%3A-%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cs*%3D%5Cs*%22%5B%5E%22%5D*%22%7C%5Cs*%3D%5Cs*'%5B%5E'%5D*'%7C%5Cs*%3D%5Cs*%5B%5E%5Cs%22'%3D%3C%3E%60%5D%2B)%3F%2F).getRegex()%2Cre%3D%2F(%3F%3A%5C%5B(%3F%3A%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D)*%5C%5D%7C%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%60%2B(%3F!%60)%5B%5E%60%5D*%3F%60%2B(%3F!%60)%7C%60%60%2B(%3F%3D%5C%5D)%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%60%5D)*%3F%2F%2Cjr%3Db(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5C(%5Cs*(href)(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5B%20%5Ct%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%3F%7C%5Cn%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)(title))%3F%5Cs*%5C)%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cre).replace(%22href%22%2C%2F%3C(%3F%3A%5C%5C.%7C%5B%5E%5Cn%3C%3E%5C%5C%5D)%2B%3E%7C%5B%5E%20%5Ct%5Cn%5Cx00-%5Cx1f%5D*%2F).replace(%22title%22%2C%2F%22(%3F%3A%5C%5C%22%3F%7C%5B%5E%22%5C%5C%5D)*%22%7C'(%3F%3A%5C%5C'%3F%7C%5B%5E'%5C%5C%5D)*'%7C%5C((%3F%3A%5C%5C%5C)%3F%7C%5B%5E)%5C%5C%5D)*%5C)%2F).getRegex()%2CRt%3Db(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5C%5B(ref)%5C%5D%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cre).replace(%22ref%22%2CDe).getRegex()%2CLt%3Db(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(ref)%5C%5D(%3F%3A%5C%5B%5C%5D)%3F%2F).replace(%22ref%22%2CDe).getRegex()%2CZr%3Db(%22reflink%7Cnolink(%3F!%5C%5C()%22%2C%22g%22).replace(%22reflink%22%2CRt).replace(%22nolink%22%2CLt).getRegex()%2Cdt%3D%2F%5BhH%5D%5BtT%5D%5BtT%5D%5BpP%5D%5BsS%5D%3F%7C%5BfF%5D%5BtT%5D%5BpP%5D%2F%2COe%3D%7B_backpedal%3AG%2CanyPunctuation%3AFr%2Cautolink%3Aqr%2CblockSkip%3A%24r%2Cbr%3ATt%2Ccode%3ALr%2Cdel%3AG%2CdelLDelim%3AG%2CdelRDelim%3AG%2CemStrongLDelim%3ABr%2CemStrongRDelimAst%3AOr%2CemStrongRDelimUnd%3Azr%2Cescape%3ARr%2Clink%3Ajr%2Cnolink%3ALt%2Cpunctuation%3ACr%2Creflink%3ARt%2CreflinkSearch%3AZr%2Ctag%3AVr%2Ctext%3APr%2Curl%3AG%7D%2CYr%3D%7B...Oe%2Clink%3Ab(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5C((.*%3F)%5C)%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cre).getRegex()%2Creflink%3Ab(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5Cs*%5C%5B(%5B%5E%5C%5D%5D*)%5C%5D%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cre).getRegex()%7D%2CSe%3D%7B...Oe%2CemStrongRDelimAst%3AHr%2CemStrongLDelim%3AMr%2CdelLDelim%3AGr%2CdelRDelim%3AWr%2Curl%3Ab(%2F%5E((%3F%3Aprotocol)%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%7Cwww%5C.)(%3F%3A%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5C-%5D%2B%5C.%3F)%2B%5B%5E%5Cs%3C%5D*%7C%5Eemail%2F).replace(%22protocol%22%2Cdt).replace(%22email%22%2C%2F%5BA-Za-z0-9._%2B-%5D%2B(%40)%5Ba-zA-Z0-9-_%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5C.%5Ba-zA-Z0-9-_%5D*%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D)%2B(%3F!%5B-_%5D)%2F).getRegex()%2C_backpedal%3A%2F(%3F%3A%5B%5E%3F!.%2C%3A%3B*_'%22~()%26%5D%2B%7C%5C(%5B%5E)%5D*%5C)%7C%26(%3F!%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D%2B%3B%24)%7C%5B%3F!.%2C%3A%3B*_'%22~)%5D%2B(%3F!%24))%2B%2F%2Cdel%3A%2F%5E(~~%3F)(%3F%3D%5B%5E%5Cs~%5D)((%3F%3A%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%5B%5E%5C%5C%5D)*%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D%7C%5B%5E%5Cs~%5C%5C%5D))%5C1(%3F%3D%5B%5E~%5D%7C%24)%2F%2Ctext%3Ab(%2F%5E(%5B%60~%5D%2B%7C%5B%5E%60~%5D)(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)%7C(%3F%3D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%5C%2F%3D%3F_%60%7B%5C%7C%7D~-%5D%2B%40)%7C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%5B%5C%5C%3C!%5C%5B%60*~_%5D%7C%5Cb_%7Cprotocol%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%7Cwww%5C.%7C%24)%7C%5B%5E%20%5D(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)%7C%5B%5Ea-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%5C%2F%3D%3F_%60%7B%5C%7C%7D~-%5D(%3F%3D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%5C%2F%3D%3F_%60%7B%5C%7C%7D~-%5D%2B%40)))%2F).replace(%22protocol%22%2Cdt).getRegex()%7D%2CQr%3D%7B...Se%2Cbr%3Ab(Tt).replace(%22%7B2%2C%7D%22%2C%22*%22).getRegex()%2Ctext%3Ab(Se.text).replace(%22%5C%5Cb_%22%2C%22%5C%5Cb_%7C%20%7B2%2C%7D%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%2F%5C%7B2%2C%5C%7D%2Fg%2C%22*%22).getRegex()%7D%2Cte%3D%7Bnormal%3ABe%2Cgfm%3AAr%2Cpedantic%3ASr%7D%2Cj%3D%7Bnormal%3AOe%2Cgfm%3ASe%2Cbreaks%3AQr%2Cpedantic%3AYr%7D%2CKr%3D%7B%22%26%22%3A%22%26amp%3B%22%2C%22%3C%22%3A%22%26lt%3B%22%2C%22%3E%22%3A%22%26gt%3B%22%2C'%22'%3A%22%26quot%3B%22%2C%22'%22%3A%22%26%2339%3B%22%7D%2Cmt%3De%3D%3EKr%5Be%5D%3Bfunction%20%24(e%2Ct)%7Bif(t)%7Bif(N.escapeTest.test(e))return%20e.replace(N.escapeReplace%2Cmt)%7Delse%20if(N.escapeTestNoEncode.test(e))return%20e.replace(N.escapeReplaceNoEncode%2Cmt)%3Breturn%20e%7Dfunction%20bt(e)%7Btry%7Be%3DencodeURI(e).replace(N.percentDecode%2C%22%25%22)%7Dcatch%7Breturn%20null%7Dreturn%20e%7Dfunction%20kt(e%2Ct)%7Blet%20r%3De.replace(N.findPipe%2C(s%2Ca%2Cl)%3D%3E%7Blet%20h%3D!1%2Co%3Da%3Bfor(%3B--o%3E%3D0%26%26l%5Bo%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%5C%5C%22%3B)h%3D!h%3Breturn%20h%3F%22%7C%22%3A%22%20%7C%22%7D)%2Ci%3Dr.split(N.splitPipe)%2Cn%3D0%3Bif(i%5B0%5D.trim()%7C%7Ci.shift()%2Ci.length%3E0%26%26!i.at(-1)%3F.trim()%26%26i.pop()%2Ct)if(i.length%3Et)i.splice(t)%3Belse%20for(%3Bi.length%3Ct%3B)i.push(%22%22)%3Bfor(%3Bn%3Ci.length%3Bn%2B%2B)i%5Bn%5D%3Di%5Bn%5D.trim().replace(N.slashPipe%2C%22%7C%22)%3Breturn%20i%7Dfunction%20H(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Blet%20i%3De.length%3Bif(i%3D%3D%3D0)return%22%22%3Blet%20n%3D0%3Bfor(%3Bn%3Ci%3B)%7Blet%20s%3De.charAt(i-n-1)%3Bif(s%3D%3D%3Dt%26%26!r)n%2B%2B%3Belse%20if(s!%3D%3Dt%26%26r)n%2B%2B%3Belse%20break%7Dreturn%20e.slice(0%2Ci-n)%7Dfunction%20xt(e)%7Blet%20t%3De.split(%60%0A%60)%2Cr%3Dt.length-1%3Bfor(%3Br%3E%3D0%26%26N.blankLine.test(t%5Br%5D)%3B)r--%3Breturn%20t.length-r%3C%3D2%3Fe%3At.slice(0%2Cr%2B1).join(%60%0A%60)%7Dfunction%20Jr(e%2Ct)%7Bif(e.indexOf(t%5B1%5D)%3D%3D%3D-1)return-1%3Blet%20r%3D0%3Bfor(let%20i%3D0%3Bi%3Ce.length%3Bi%2B%2B)if(e%5Bi%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%5C%5C%22)i%2B%2B%3Belse%20if(e%5Bi%5D%3D%3D%3Dt%5B0%5D)r%2B%2B%3Belse%20if(e%5Bi%5D%3D%3D%3Dt%5B1%5D%26%26(r--%2Cr%3C0))return%20i%3Breturn%20r%3E0%3F-2%3A-1%7Dfunction%20ei(e%2Ct%3D0)%7Blet%20r%3Dt%2Ci%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20n%20of%20e)if(n%3D%3D%3D%22%09%22)%7Blet%20s%3D4-r%254%3Bi%2B%3D%22%20%22.repeat(s)%2Cr%2B%3Ds%7Delse%20i%2B%3Dn%2Cr%2B%2B%3Breturn%20i%7Dfunction%20_t(e%2Ct%2Cr%2Ci%2Cn)%7Blet%20s%3Dt.href%2Ca%3Dt.title%7C%7Cnull%2Cl%3De%5B1%5D.replace(n.other.outputLinkReplace%2C%22%241%22)%3Bi.state.inLink%3D!0%3Blet%20h%3D%7Btype%3Ae%5B0%5D.charAt(0)%3D%3D%3D%22!%22%3F%22image%22%3A%22link%22%2Craw%3Ar%2Chref%3As%2Ctitle%3Aa%2Ctext%3Al%2Ctokens%3Ai.inlineTokens(l)%7D%3Breturn%20i.state.inLink%3D!1%2Ch%7Dfunction%20ti(e%2Ct%2Cr)%7Blet%20i%3De.match(r.other.indentCodeCompensation)%3Bif(i%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20t%3Blet%20n%3Di%5B1%5D%3Breturn%20t.split(%60%0A%60).map(s%3D%3E%7Blet%20a%3Ds.match(r.other.beginningSpace)%3Bif(a%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20s%3Blet%5Bl%5D%3Da%3Breturn%20l.length%3E%3Dn.length%3Fs.slice(n.length)%3As%7D).join(%60%0A%60)%7Dvar%20ie%3Dclass%7Boptions%3Brules%3Blexer%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CW%7Dspace(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.newline.exec(e)%3Bif(t%26%26t%5B0%5D.length%3E0)return%7Btype%3A%22space%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%7D%7Dcode(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.code.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%3Dthis.options.pedantic%3Ft%5B0%5D%3Axt(t%5B0%5D)%2Ci%3Dr.replace(this.rules.other.codeRemoveIndent%2C%22%22)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22code%22%2Craw%3Ar%2CcodeBlockStyle%3A%22indented%22%2Ctext%3Ai%7D%7D%7Dfences(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.fences.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%3Dt%5B0%5D%2Ci%3Dti(r%2Ct%5B3%5D%7C%7C%22%22%2Cthis.rules)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22code%22%2Craw%3Ar%2Clang%3At%5B2%5D%3Ft%5B2%5D.trim().replace(this.rules.inline.anyPunctuation%2C%22%241%22)%3At%5B2%5D%2Ctext%3Ai%7D%7D%7Dheading(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.heading.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%3Dt%5B2%5D.trim()%3Bif(this.rules.other.endingHash.test(r))%7Blet%20i%3DH(r%2C%22%23%22)%3B(this.options.pedantic%7C%7C!i%7C%7Cthis.rules.other.endingSpaceChar.test(i))%26%26(r%3Di.trim())%7Dreturn%7Btype%3A%22heading%22%2Craw%3AH(t%5B0%5D%2C%60%0A%60)%2Cdepth%3At%5B1%5D.length%2Ctext%3Ar%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inline(r)%7D%7D%7Dhr(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.hr.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return%7Btype%3A%22hr%22%2Craw%3AH(t%5B0%5D%2C%60%0A%60)%7D%7Dblockquote(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.blockquote.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%3DH(t%5B0%5D%2C%60%0A%60).split(%60%0A%60)%2Ci%3D%22%22%2Cn%3D%22%22%2Cs%3D%5B%5D%3Bfor(%3Br.length%3E0%3B)%7Blet%20a%3D!1%2Cl%3D%5B%5D%2Ch%3Bfor(h%3D0%3Bh%3Cr.length%3Bh%2B%2B)if(this.rules.other.blockquoteStart.test(r%5Bh%5D))l.push(r%5Bh%5D)%2Ca%3D!0%3Belse%20if(!a)l.push(r%5Bh%5D)%3Belse%20break%3Br%3Dr.slice(h)%3Blet%20o%3Dl.join(%60%0A%60)%2Cc%3Do.replace(this.rules.o length)%2Cd%26%26this.rules.other.blankLine.test(p)%26%26(o%2B%3Dp%2B%60%0A%60%2Ce%3De.substring(p.length%2B1)%2Ch%3D!0)%2C!h)%7Blet%20x%3Dthis.rules.other.nextBulletRegex(g)%2CA%3Dthis.rules.other.hrRegex(g)%2CE%3Dthis.rules.other.fencesBeginRegex(g)%2CL%3Dthis.rules.other.headingBeginRegex(g)%2CP%3Dthis.rules.other.htmlBeginRegex(g)%2C_%3Dthis.rules.other.blockquoteBeginRegex(g)%3Bfor(%3Be%3B)%7Blet%20C%3De.split(%60%0A%60%2C1)%5B0%5D%2Cy%3Bif(p%3DC%2Cthis.options.pedantic%3F(p%3Dp.replace(this.rules.other.listReplaceNesting%2C%22%20%20%22)%2Cy%3Dp)%3Ay%3Dp.replace(this.rules.other.tabCharGlobal%2C%22%20%20%20%20%22)%2CE.test(p)%7C%7CL.test(p)%7C%7CP.test(p)%7C%7C_.test(p)%7C%7Cx.test(p)%7C%7CA.test(p))break%3Bif(y.search(this.rules.other.nonSpaceChar)%3E%3Dg%7C%7C!p.trim())c%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2By.slice(g)%3Belse%7Bif(d%7C%7Cu.replace(this.rules.other.tabCharGlobal%2C%22%20%20%20%20%22).search(this.rules.other.nonSpaceChar)%3E%3D4%7C%7CE.test(u)%7C%7CL.test(u)%7C%7CA.test(u))break%3Bc%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bp%7Dd%3D!p.trim()%2Co%2B%3DC%2B%60%0A%60%2Ce%3De.substring(C.length%2B1)%2Cu%3Dy.slice(g)%7D%7Dn.loose%7C%7C(a%3Fn.loose%3D!0%3Athis.rules.other.doubleBlankLine.test(o)%26%26(a%3D!0))%2Cn.items.push(%7Btype%3A%22list_item%22%2Craw%3Ao%2Ctask%3A!!this.options.gfm%26%26this.rules.other.listIsTask.test(c)%2Cloose%3A!1%2Ctext%3Ac%2Ctokens%3A%5B%5D%7D)%2Cn.raw%2B%3Do%7Dlet%20l%3Dn.items.at(-1)%3Bif(l)l.raw%3Dl.raw.trimEnd()%2Cl.text%3Dl.text.trimEnd()%3Belse%20return%3Bn.raw%3Dn.raw.trimEnd()%3Bfor(let%20h%20of%20n.items)%7Bif(this.lexer.state.top%3D!1%2Ch.tokens%3Dthis.lexer.blockTokens(h.text%2C%5B%5D)%2Ch.task)%7Bif(h.text%3Dh.text.replace(this.rules.other.listReplaceTask%2C%22%22)%2Ch.tokens%5B0%5D%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%7C%7Ch.tokens%5B0%5D%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22paragraph%22)%7Bh.tokens%5B0%5D.raw%3Dh.tokens%5B0%5D.raw.replace(this.rules.other.listReplaceTask%2C%22%22)%2Ch.tokens%5B0%5D.text%3Dh.tokens%5B0%5D.text.replace(this.rules.other.listReplaceTask%2C%22%22)%3Bfo Case()%5D%3Bif(!n)%7Blet%20s%3Dr%5B0%5D.charAt(0)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3As%2Ctext%3As%7D%7Dreturn%20_t(r%2Cn%2Cr%5B0%5D%2Cthis.lexer%2Cthis.rules)%7D%7DemStrong(e%2Ct%2Cr%3D%22%22)%7Blet%20i%3Dthis.rules.inline.emStrongLDelim.exec(e)%3Bif(!(!i%7C%7C!i%5B1%5D%26%26!i%5B2%5D%26%26!i%5B3%5D%26%26!i%5B4%5D%7C%7Ci%5B4%5D%26%26r.match(this.rules.other.unicodeAlphaNumeric))%26%26(!(i%5B1%5D%7C%7Ci%5B3%5D)%7C%7C!r%7C%7Cthis.rules.inline.punctuation.exec(r)))%7Blet%20n%3D%5B...i%5B0%5D%5D.length-1%2Cs%2Ca%2Cl%3Dn%2Ch%3D0%2Co%3Di%5B0%5D%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3D%22*%22%3Fthis.rules.inline.emStrongRDelimAst%3Athis.rules.inline.emStrongRDelimUnd%3Bfor(o.lastIndex%3D0%2Ct%3Dt.slice(-1*e.length%2Bn)%3B(i%3Do.exec(t))!%3D%3Dnull%3B)%7Bif(s%3Di%5B1%5D%7C%7Ci%5B2%5D%7C%7Ci%5B3%5D%7C%7Ci%5B4%5D%7C%7Ci%5B5%5D%7C%7Ci%5B6%5D%2C!s)continue%3Bif(a%3D%5B...s%5D.length%2Ci%5B3%5D%7C%7Ci%5B4%5D)%7Bl%2B%3Da%3Bcontinue%7Delse%20if((i%5B5%5D%7C%7Ci%5B6%5D)%26%26n%253%26%26!((n%2Ba)%253))%7Bh%2B%3Da%3Bcontinue%7Dif(l-%3Da%2Cl%3E0)continue%3Ba%3DMath.min(a%2Ca%2Bl%2Bh)%3Blet%20c%3D%5B...i%5B0%5D%5D%5B0%5D.length%2Cu%3De.slice(0%2Cn%2Bi.index%2Bc%2Ba)%3Bif(Math.min(n%2Ca)%252)%7Blet%20d%3Du.slice(1%2C-1)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22em%22%2Craw%3Au%2Ctext%3Ad%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inlineTokens(d)%7D%7Dlet%20p%3Du.slice(2%2C-2)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22strong%22%2Craw%3Au%2Ctext%3Ap%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inlineTokens(p)%7D%7D%7D%7Dcodespan(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.code.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%3Dt%5B2%5D.replace(this.rules.other.newLineCharGlobal%2C%22%20%22)%2Ci%3Dthis.rules.other.nonSpaceChar.test(r)%2Cn%3Dthis.rules.other.startingSpaceChar.test(r)%26%26this.rules.other.endingSpaceChar.test(r)%3Breturn%20i%26%26n%26%26(r%3Dr.substring(1%2Cr.length-1))%2C%7Btype%3A%22codespan%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3Ar%7D%7D%7Dbr(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.br.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return%7Btype%3A%22br%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%7D%7Ddel(e%2Ct%2Cr%3D%22%22)%7Blet%20i%3Dthis.rules.inline.delLDelim.exec(e)%3Bif(i%26%26(!i%5B1%5D%7C%7C!r%7C%7Cthis.rules.inline.punctuation.exec(r)))%7Blet%20n%3D%5B...i%5B0%5D%5D.length-1%2Cs%2Ca%2Cl%3Dn%2Ch%3Dthis.rules.inline.delRDelim%3Bfor(h.lastIndex%3D0%2Ct%3Dt.slice(-1*e.length%2Bn)%3B(i%3Dh.exec(t))!%3D%3Dnull%3B)%7Bif(s%3Di%5B1%5D%7C%7Ci%5B2%5D%7C%7Ci%5B3%5D%7C%7Ci%5B4%5D%7C%7Ci%5B5%5D%7C%7Ci%5B6%5D%2C!s%7C%7C(a%3D%5B...s%5D.length%2Ca!%3D%3Dn))continue%3Bif(i%5B3%5D%7C%7Ci%5B4%5D)%7Bl%2B%3Da%3Bcontinue%7Dif(l-%3Da%2Cl%3E0)continue%3Ba%3DMath.min(a%2Ca%2Bl)%3Blet%20o%3D%5B...i%5B0%5D%5D%5B0%5D.length%2Cc%3De.slice(0%2Cn%2Bi.index%2Bo%2Ba)%2Cu%3Dc.slice(n%2C-n)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22del%22%2Craw%3Ac%2Ctext%3Au%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inlineTokens(u)%7D%7D%7D%7Dautolink(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.autolink.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%2Ci%3Breturn%20t%5B2%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%40%22%3F(r%3Dt%5B1%5D%2Ci%3D%22mailto%3A%22%2Br)%3A(r%3Dt%5B1%5D%2Ci%3Dr)%2C%7Btype%3A%22link%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3Ar%2Chref%3Ai%2Ctokens%3A%5B%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3Ar%2Ctext%3Ar%7D%5D%7D%7D%7Durl(e)%7Blet%20t%3Bif(t%3Dthis.rules.inline.url.exec(e))%7Blet%20r%2Ci%3Bif(t%5B2%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%40%22)r%3Dt%5B0%5D%2Ci%3D%22mailto%3A%22%2Br%3Belse%7Blet%20n%3Bdo%20n%3Dt%5B0%5D%2Ct%5B0%5D%3Dthis.rules.inline._backpedal.exec(t%5B0%5D)%3F.%5B0%5D%3F%3F%22%22%3Bwhile(n!%3D%3Dt%5B0%5D)%3Br%3Dt%5B0%5D%2Ct%5B1%5D%3D%3D%3D%22www.%22%3Fi%3D%22http%3A%2F%2F%22%2Bt%5B0%5D%3Ai%3Dt%5B0%5D%7Dreturn%7Btype%3A%22link%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3Ar%2Chref%3Ai%2Ctokens%3A%5B%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3Ar%2Ctext%3Ar%7D%5D%7D%7D%7DinlineText(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.text.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20r%3Dthis.lexer.state.inRawBlock%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3At%5B0%5D%2Cescaped%3Ar%7D%7D%7D%7D%2CI%3Dclass%20Re%7Btokens%3Boptions%3Bstate%3BinlineQueue%3Btokenizer%3Bconstructor(t)%7Bthis.tokens%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.tokens.links%3DObject.create(null)%2Cthis.options%3Dt%7C%7CW%2Cthis.options.tokenizer%3Dthis.options.tokenizer%7C%7Cnew%20ie%2Cthis.tokenizer%3Dthis.options.t ))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.hr(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.blockquote(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.list(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.html(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.def(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%3Blet%20l%3Dr.at(-1)%3Bl%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22paragraph%22%7C%7Cl%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(l.raw%2B%3D(l.raw.endsWith(%60%0A%60)%3F%22%22%3A%60%0A%60)%2Bs.raw%2Cl.text%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bs.raw%2Cthis.inlineQueue.at(-1).src%3Dl.text)%3Athis.tokens.links%5Bs.tag%5D%7C%7C(this.tokens.links%5Bs.tag%5D%3D%7Bhref%3As.href%2Ctitle%3As.title%7D%2Cr.push(s))%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.table(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.lheading(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%2Cr.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dlet%20a%3Dt%3Bif(this.options.extensions%3F.startBlock)%7Blet%20l%3D1%2F0%2Ch%3Dt.slice(1)%2Co%3Bthis.options.extensions.startBlock.forEach(c%3D%3E%7Bo%3Dc.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Ch)%2Ctypeof%20o%3D%3D%22number%22%26%26o%3E%3D0%26%26(l%3DMath.min(l%2Co))%7D)%2Cl%3C1%2F0%26%26l%3E%3D0%26%26(a%3Dt.substring(0%2Cl%2B1))%7Dif(this.state.top%26%26(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.paragraph(a)))%7Blet%20l%3Dr.at(-1)%3Bi%26%26l%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22paragraph%22%3F(l.raw%2B%3D(l.raw.endsWith(%60%0A%60)%3F%22%22%3A%60%0A%60)%2Bs.raw%2Cl.text%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bs.text%2Cthis.inlineQueue.pop()%2Cthis.inlineQueue.at(-1).src%3Dl.text)%3Ar.push(s)%2Ci%3Da.length!%3D%3Dt.length%2Ct%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3Dthis.tokenizer.text(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(s.raw.length)%3Blet%20l%3Dr.at(-1)%3Bl%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(l.raw%2B%3D(l.raw.endsWith(%60%0A%60)%3F%22%22%3A%60%0A%60)%2Bs.raw%2Cl.text%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bs.text%2Cthis.inlineQueue.pop()%2Cthis.inlineQueue.at(-1).src%3Dl.text)%3Ar.push(s)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(t)%7Bthis.infiniteLoopError(t.charCodeAt(0))%3Bbreak%7D%7Dreturn%20this.state.top%3D!0%2Cr%7Dinline(t%2Cr%3D%5B%5D)%7Breturn%20this.inlineQueue.push(%7Bsrc%3At%2Ctokens%3Ar%7D)%2Cr%7DinlineTokens(t%2Cr%3D%5B%5D)%7Bthis.tokenizer.lexer%3Dthis%3Blet%20i%3Dt%2Cn%3Dnull%3Bif(this.tokens.links)%7Blet%20o%3DObject.keys(this.tokens.links)%3Bif(o.length%3E0)for(%3B(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.rules.inline.reflinkSearch.exec(i))!%3D%3Dnull%3B)o.includes(n%5B0%5D.slice(n%5B0%5D.lastIndexOf(%22%5B%22)%2B1%2C-1))%26%26(i%3Di.slice(0%2Cn.index)%2B%22%5B%22%2B%22a%22.repeat(n%5B0%5D.length-2)%2B%22%5D%22%2Bi.slice(this.tokenizer.rules.inline.reflinkSearch.lastIndex))%7Dfor(%3B(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.rules.inline.anyPunctuation.exec(i))!%3D%3Dnull%3B)i%3Di.slice(0%2Cn.index)%2B%22%2B%2B%22%2Bi.slice(this.tokenizer.rules.inline.anyPunctuation.lastIndex)%3Blet%20s%3Bfor(%3B(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.rules.inline.blockSkip.exec(i))!%3D%3Dnull%3B)s%3Dn%5B2%5D%3Fn%5B2%5D.length%3A0%2Ci%3Di.slice(0%2Cn.index%2Bs)%2B%22%5B%22%2B%22a%22.repeat(n%5B0%5D.length-s-2)%2B%22%5D%22%2Bi.slice(this.tokenizer.rules.inline.blockSkip.lastIndex)%3Bi%3Dthis.options.hooks%3F.emStrongMask%3F.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Ci)%3F%3Fi%3Blet%20a%3D!1%2Cl%3D%22%22%2Ch%3D1%2F0%3Bfor(%3Bt%3B)%7Bif(t.length%3Ch)h%3Dt.length%3Belse%7Bthis.infiniteLoopError(t.charCodeAt(0))%3Bbreak%7Da%7C%7C(l%3D%22%22)%2Ca%3D!1%3Blet%20o%3Bif(this.options.extensions%3F.inline%3F.some(u%3D%3E(o%3Du.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Ct%2Cr))%3F(t%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%2C!0)%3A!1))continue%3Bif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.escape(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.tag(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.link(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.reflink(t%2Cthis.tokens.links))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%3Blet%20u%3Dr.at(-1)%3Bo.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%26%26u%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(u.raw%2B%3Do.raw%2Cu.text%2B%3Do.text)%3Ar.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.emStrong(t%2Ci%2Cl))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.codespan(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.br(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.del(t%2Ci%2Cl))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.autolink(t))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(!this.state.inLink%26%26(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.url(t)))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Cr.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dlet%20c%3Dt%3Bif(this.options.extensions%3F.startInline)%7Blet%20u%3D1%2F0%2Cp%3Dt.slice(1)%2Cd%3Bthis.options.extensions.startInline.forEach(g%3D%3E%7Bd%3Dg.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Cp)%2Ctypeof%20d%3D%3D%22number%22%26%26d%3E%3D0%26%26(u%3DMath.min(u%2Cd))%7D)%2Cu%3C1%2F0%26%26u%3E%3D0%26%26(c%3Dt.substring(0%2Cu%2B1))%7Dif(o%3Dthis.tokenizer.inlineText(c))%7Bt%3Dt.substring(o.raw.length)%2Co.raw.slice(-1)!%3D%3D%22_%22%26%26(l%3Do.raw.slice(-1))%2Ca%3D!0%3Blet%20u%3Dr.at(-1)%3Bu%3F.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(u.raw%2B%3Do.raw%2Cu.text%2B%3Do.text)%3Ar.push(o)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(t)%7Bthis.infiniteLoopError(t.charCodeAt(0))%3Bbreak%7D%7Dreturn%20r%7DinfiniteLoopError(t)%7Blet%20r%3D%22Infinite%20loop%20on%20byte%3A%20%22%2Bt%3Bif(this.options.silent)console.error(r)%3Belse%20throw%20new%20Error(r)%7D%7D%2Cne%3Dclass%7Boptions%3Bparser%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CW%7Dspace(e)%7Breturn%22%22%7Dcode(%7Btext%3Ae%2Clang%3At%2Cescaped%3Ar%7D)%7Blet%20i%3D(t%7C%7C%22%22).match(N.notSpaceStart)%3F.%5B0%5D%2Cn%3De.replace(N.endingNewline%2C%22%22)%2B%60%0A%60%3Breturn%20i%3F'%3Cpre%3E%3Ccode%20class%3D%22language-'%2B%24(i)%2B'%22%3E'%2B(r%3Fn%3A%24(n%2C!0))%2B%60%3C%2Fcode%3E%3C%2Fpre%3E%0A%60%3A%22%3Cpre%3E%3Ccode%3E%22%2B(r%3Fn%3A%24(n%2C!0))%2B%60%3C%2Fcode%3E%3C%2Fpre%3E%0A%60%7Dblockquote(%7Btokens%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Cblockquote%3E%0A%24%7Bthis.parser.parse(e)%7D%3C%2Fblockquote%3E%0A%60%7Dhtml(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Ddef(e)%7Breturn%22%22%7Dheading(%7Btokens%3Ae%2Cdepth%3At%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Ch%24%7Bt%7D%3E%24%7Bthis.parser.parseInline(e)%7D%3C%2Fh%24%7Bt%7D%3E%0A%60%7Dhr(e)%7Breturn%60%3Chr%3E%0A%60%7Dlist(e)%7Blet%20t%3De.ordered%2Cr%3De.start%2Ci%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20a%3D0%3Ba%3Ce.items.length%3Ba%2B%2B)%7Blet%20l%3De.items%5Ba%5D%3Bi%2B%3Dthis.listitem(l)%7Dlet%20n%3Dt%3F%22ol%22%3A%22ul%22%2Cs%3Dt%26%26r!%3D%3D1%3F'%20start%3D%22'%2Br%2B'%22'%3A%22%22%3Breturn%22%3C%22%2Bn%2Bs%2B%60%3E%0A%60%2Bi%2B%22%3C%2F%22%2Bn%2B%60%3E%0A%60%7Dlistitem(e)%7Breturn%60%3Cli%3E%24%7Bthis.parser.parse(e.tokens)%7D%3C%2Fli%3E%0A%60%7Dcheckbox(%7Bchecked%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%22%3Cinput%20%22%2B(e%3F'checked%3D%22%22%20'%3A%22%22)%2B'disabled%3D%22%22%20type%3D%22checkbox%22%3E%20'%7Dparagraph(%7Btokens%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Cp%3E%24%7Bthis.parser.parseInline(e)%7D%3C%2Fp%3E%0A%60%7Dtable(e)%7Blet%20t%3D%22%22%2Cr%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20n%3D0%3Bn%3Ce.header.length%3Bn%2B%2B)r%2B%3Dthis.tablecell(e.header%5Bn%5D)%3Bt%2B%3Dthis.tablerow(%7Btext%3Ar%7D)%3Blet%20i%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20n%3D0%3Bn%3Ce.rows.length%3Bn%2B%2B)%7Blet%20s%3De.rows%5Bn%5D%3Br%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20a%3D0%3Ba%3Cs.length%3Ba%2B%2B)r%2B%3Dthis.tablecell(s%5Ba%5D)%3Bi%2B%3Dthis.tablerow(%7Btext%3Ar%7D)%7Dreturn%20i%26%26(i%3D%60%3Ctbody%3E%24%7Bi%7D%3C%2Ftbody%3E%60)%2C%60%3Ctable%3E%0A%3Cthead%3E%0A%60%2Bt%2B%60%3C%2Fthead%3E%0A%60%2Bi%2B%60%3C%2Ftable%3E%0A%60%7Dtablerow(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Ctr%3E%0A%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Ftr%3E%0A%60%7Dtablecell(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.parser.parseInline(e.tokens)%2Cr%3De.header%3F%22th%22%3A%22td%22%3Breturn(e.align%3F%60%3C%24%7Br%7D%20align%3D%22%24%7Be.align%7D%22%3E%60%3A%60%3C%24%7Br%7D%3E%60)%2Bt%2B%60%3C%2F%24%7Br%7D%3E%0A%60%7Dstrong(%7Btokens%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Cstrong%3E%24%7Bthis.parser.parseInline(e)%7D%3C%2Fstrong%3E%60%7Dem(%7Btokens%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Cem%3E%24%7Bthis.parser.parseInline(e)%7D%3C%2Fem%3E%60%7Dcodespan(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Ccode%3E%24%7B%24(e%2C!0)%7D%3C%2Fcode%3E%60%7Dbr(e)%7Breturn%22%3Cbr%3E%22%7Ddel(%7Btokens%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%60%3Cdel%3E%24%7Bthis.parser.parseInline(e)%7D%3C%2Fdel%3E%60%7Dlink(%7Bhref%3Ae%2Ctitle%3At%2Ctokens%3Ar%7D)%7Blet%20i%3Dthis.parser.parseInline(r)%2Cn%3Dbt(e)%3Bif(n%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20i%3Be%3Dn%3Blet%20s%3D'%3Ca%20href%3D%22'%2Be%2B'%22'%3Breturn%20t%26%26(s%2B%3D'%20title%3D%22'%2B%24(t)%2B'%22')%2Cs%2B%3D%22%3E%22%2Bi%2B%22%3C%2Fa%3E%22%2Cs%7Dimage(%7Bhref%3Ae%2Ctitle%3At%2Ctext%3Ar%2Ctokens%3Ai%7D)%7Bi%26%26(r%3Dthis.parser.parseInline(i%2Cthis.parser.textRenderer))%3Blet%20n%3Dbt(e)%3Bif(n%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20%24(r)%3Be%3Dn%3Blet%20s%3D%60%3Cimg%20src%3D%22%24%7Be%7D%22%20alt%3D%22%24%7B%24(r)%7D%22%60%3Breturn%20t%26%26(s%2B%3D%60%20title%3D%22%24%7B%24(t)%7D%22%60)%2Cs%2B%3D%22%3E%22%2Cs%7Dtext(e)%7Breturn%22tokens%22in%20e%26%26e.tokens%3Fthis.parser.parseInline(e.tokens)%3A%22escaped%22in%20e%26%26e.escaped%3Fe.text%3A%24(e.text)%7D%7D%2CHe%3Dclass%7Bstrong(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Dem(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Dcodespan(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Ddel(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Dhtml(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Dtext(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7Dlink(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%22%22%2Be%7Dimage(%7Btext%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%22%22%2Be%7Dbr()%7Breturn%22%22%7Dcheckbox(%7Braw%3Ae%7D)%7Breturn%20e%7D%7D%2CD%3Dclass%20Le%7Boptions%3Brenderer%3BtextRenderer%3Bconstructor(t)%7Bthis.options%3Dt%7C%7CW%2Cthis.options.renderer%3Dthis.options.renderer%7C%7Cnew%20ne%2Cthis.renderer%3Dthis.options.renderer%2Cthis.renderer.options%3Dthis.options%2Cthis.renderer.parser%3Dthis%2Cthis.textRenderer%3Dnew%20He%7Dstatic%20parse(t%2Cr)%7Breturn%20new%20Le(r).parse(t)%7Dstatic%20parseInline(t%2Cr)%7Breturn%20new%20Le(r).parseInline(t)%7Dparse(t)%7Bthis.renderer.parser%3Dthis%3Blet%20r%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20i%3D0%3Bi%3Ct.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Blet%20n%3Dt%5Bi%5D%3Bif(this.options.extensions%3F.renderers%3F.%5Bn.type%5D)%7Blet%20a%3Dn%2Cl%3Dthis.options.extensions.renderers%5Ba.type%5D.call(%7Bparser%3Athis%7D%2Ca)%3Bif(l!%3D%3D!1%7C%7C!%5B%22space%22%2C%22hr%22%2C%22heading%22%2C%22code%22%2C%22table%22%2C%22blockquote%22%2C%22list%22%2C%22html%22%2C%22def%22%2C%22paragraph%22%2C%22text%22%5D.includes(a.type))%7Br%2B%3Dl%7C%7C%22%22%3Bcontinue%7D%7Dlet%20s%3Dn%3Bswitch(s.type)%7Bcase%22space%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.space(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22hr%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.hr(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22heading%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.heading(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22code%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.code(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22table%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.table(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22blockquote%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.blockquote(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22list%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.list(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22checkbox%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.checkbox(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22html%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.html(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22def%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.def(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22paragraph%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.paragraph(s)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22text%22%3A%7Br%2B%3Dthis.renderer.text(s)%3Bbreak%7Ddefault%3A%7Blet%20a%3D'Token%20with%20%22'%2Bs.type%2B'%22%20type%20was%20not%20found.'%3Bif(this.options.silent)return%20console.error(a)%2C%22%22%3Bthrow%20new%20Error(a)%7D%7D%7Dreturn%20r%7DparseInline(t%2Cr%3Dthis.renderer)%7Bthis.renderer.parser%3Dthis%3Blet%20i%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20n%3D0%3Bn%3Ct.length%3Bn%2B%2B)%7Blet%20s%3Dt%5Bn%5D%3Bif(this.options.extensions%3F.renderers%3F.%5Bs.type%5D)%7Blet%20l%3Dthis.options.extensions.renderers%5Bs.type%5D.call(%7Bparser%3Athis%7D%2Cs)%3Bif(l!%3D%3D!1%7C%7C!%5B%22escape%22%2C%22html%22%2C%22link%22%2C%22image%22%2C%22strong%22%2C%22em%22%2C%22codespan%22%2C%22br%22%2C%22del%22%2C%22text%22%5D.includes(s.type))%7Bi%2B%3Dl%7C%7C%22%22%3Bcontinue%7D%7Dlet%20a%3Ds%3Bswitch(a.type)%7Bcase%22escape%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.text(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22html%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.html(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22link%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.link(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22image%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.image(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22checkbox%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.checkbox(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22strong%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.strong(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22em%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.em(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22codespan%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.codespan(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22br%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.br(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22del%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.del(a)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22text%22%3A%7Bi%2B%3Dr.text(a)%3Bbreak%7Ddefault%3A%7Blet%20l%3D'Token%20with%20%22'%2Ba.type%2B'%22%20type%20was%20not%20found.'%3Bif(this.options.silent)return%20console.error(l)%2C%22%22%3Bthrow%20new%20Error(l)%7D%7D%7Dreturn%20i%7D%7D%2CZ%3Dclass%7Boptions%3Bblock%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CW%7Dstatic%20passThroughHooks%3Dnew%20Set(%5B%22preprocess%22%2C%22postprocess%22%2C%22processAllTokens%22%2C%22emStrongMask%22%5D)%3Bstatic%20passThroughHooksRespectAsync%3Dnew%20Set(%5B%22preprocess%22%2C%22postprocess%22%2C%22processAllTokens%22%5D)%3Bpreprocess(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dpostprocess(e)%7Breturn%20e%7DprocessAllTokens(e)%7Breturn%20e%7DemStrongMask(e)%7Breturn%20e%7DprovideLexer(e%3Dthis.block)%7Breturn%20e%3FI.lex%3AI.lexInline%7DprovideParser(e%3Dthis.block)%7Breturn%20e%3FD.parse%3AD.parseInline%7D%7D%2Cri%3Dclass%7Bdefaults%3DPe()%3Boptions%3Dthis.setOptions%3Bparse%3Dthis.parseMarkdown(!0)%3BparseInline%3Dthis.parseMarkdown(!1)%3BParser%3DD%3BRenderer%3Dne%3BTextRenderer%3DHe%3BLexer%3DI%3BTokenizer%3Die%3BHooks%3DZ%3Bconstructor(...e)%7Bthis.use(...e)%7DwalkTokens(e%2Ct)%7Blet%20r%3D%5B%5D%3Bfor(let%20i%20of%20e)switch(r%3Dr.concat(t.call(this%2Ci))%2Ci.type)%7Bcase%22table%22%3A%7Blet%20n%3Di%3Bfor(let%20s%20of%20n.header)r%3Dr.concat(this.walkTokens(s.tokens%2Ct))%3Bfor(let%20s%20of%20n.rows)for(let%20a%20of%20s)r%3Dr.concat(this.walkTokens(a.tokens%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22list%22%3A%7Blet%20n%3Di%3Br%3Dr.concat(this.walkTokens(n.items%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Ddefault%3A%7Blet%20n%3Di%3Bthis.defaults.extensions%3F.childTokens%3F.%5Bn.type%5D%3Fthis.defaults.extensions.childTokens%5Bn.type%5D.forEach(s%3D%3E%7Blet%20a%3Dn%5Bs%5D.flat(1%2F0)%3Br%3Dr.concat(this.walkTokens(a%2Ct))%7D)%3An.tokens%26%26(r%3Dr.concat(this.walkTokens(n.tokens%2Ct)))%7D%7Dreturn%20r%7Duse(...e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.defaults.extensions%7C%7C%7Brenderers%3A%7B%7D%2CchildTokens%3A%7B%7D%7D%3Breturn%20e.forEach(r%3D%3E%7Blet%20i%3D%7B...r%7D%3Bif(i.async%3Dthis.defaults.async%7C%7Ci.async%7C%7C!1%2Cr.extensions%26%26(r.extensions.forEach(n%3D%3E%7Bif(!n.name)throw%20new%20Error(%22extension%20name%20required%22)%3Bif(%22renderer%22in%20n)%7Blet%20s%3Dt.renderers%5Bn.name%5D%3Bs%3Ft.renderers%5Bn.name%5D%3Dfunction(...a)%7Blet%20l%3Dn.renderer.apply(this%2Ca)%3Breturn%20l%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(l%3Ds.apply(this%2Ca))%2Cl%7D%3At.renderers%5Bn.name%5D%3Dn.renderer%7Dif(%22tokenizer%22in%20n)%7Bif(!n.level%7C%7Cn.level!%3D%3D%22block%22%26%26n.level!%3D%3D%22inline%22)throw%20new%20Error(%22extension%20level%20must%20be%20'block'%20or%20'inline'%22)%3Blet%20s%3Dt%5Bn.level%5D%3Bs%3Fs.unshift(n.tokenizer)%3At%5Bn.level%5D%3D%5Bn.tokenizer%5D%2Cn.start%26%26(n.level%3D%3D%3D%22block%22%3Ft.startBlock%3Ft.startBlock.push(n.start)%3At.startBlock%3D%5Bn.start%5D%3An.level%3D%3D%3D%22inline%22%26%26(t.startInline%3Ft.startInline.push(n.start)%3At.startInline%3D%5Bn.start%5D))%7D%22childTokens%22in%20n%26%26n.childTokens%26%26(t.childTokens%5Bn.name%5D%3Dn.childTokens)%7D)%2Ci.extensions%3Dt)%2Cr.renderer)%7Blet%20n%3Dthis.defaults.renderer%7C%7Cnew%20ne(this.defaults)%3Bfor(let%20s%20in%20r.renderer)%7Bif(!(s%20in%20n))throw%20new%20Error(%60renderer%20'%24%7Bs%7D'%20does%20not%20exist%60)%3Bif(%5B%22options%22%2C%22parser%22%5D.includes(s))continue%3Blet%20a%3Ds%2Cl%3Dr.renderer%5Ba%5D%2Ch%3Dn%5Ba%5D%3Bn%5Ba%5D%3D(...o)%3D%3E%7Blet%20c%3Dl.apply(n%2Co)%3Breturn%20c%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(c%3Dh.apply(n%2Co))%2Cc%7C%7C%22%22%7D%7Di.renderer%3Dn%7Dif(r.tokenizer)%7Blet%20n%3Dthis.defaults.tokenizer%7C%7Cnew%20ie(this.defaults)%3Bfor(let%20s%20in%20r.tokenizer)%7Bif(!(s%20in%20n))throw%20new%20Error(%60tokenizer%20'%24%7Bs%7D'%20does%20not%20exist%60)%3Bif(%5B%22options%22%2C%22rules%22%2C%22lexer%22%5D.includes(s))continue%3Blet%20a%3Ds%2Cl%3Dr.tokenizer%5Ba%5D%2Ch%3Dn%5Ba%5D%3Bn%5Ba%5D%3D(...o)%3D%3E%7Blet%20c%3Dl.apply(n%2Co)%3Breturn%20c%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(c%3Dh.apply(n%2Co))%2Cc%7D%7Di.tokenizer%3Dn%7Dif(r.hooks)%7Blet%20n%3Dthis.defaults.hooks%7C%7Cnew%20Z%3Bfor(let%20s%20in%20r.hooks)%7Bif(!(s%20in%20n))throw%20new%20Error(%60hook%20'%24%7Bs%7D'%20does%20not%20exist%60)%3Bif(%5B%22options%22%2C%22block%22%5D.includes(s))continue%3Blet%20a%3Ds%2Cl%3Dr.hooks%5Ba%5D%2Ch%3Dn%5Ba%5D%3BZ.passThroughHooks.has(s)%3Fn%5Ba%5D%3Do%3D%3E%7Bif(this.defaults.async%26%26Z.passThroughHooksRespectAsync.has(s))return(async()%3D%3E%7Blet%20u%3Dawait%20l.call(n%2Co)%3Breturn%20h.call(n%2Cu)%7D)()%3Blet%20c%3Dl.call(n%2Co)%3Breturn%20h.call(n%2Cc)%7D%3An%5Ba%5D%3D(...o)%3D%3E%7Bif(this.defaults.async)return(async()%3D%3E%7Blet%20u%3Dawait%20l.apply(n%2Co)%3Breturn%20u%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(u%3Dawait%20h.apply(n%2Co))%2Cu%7D)()%3Blet%20c%3Dl.apply(n%2Co)%3Breturn%20c%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(c%3Dh.apply(n%2Co))%2Cc%7D%7Di.hooks%3Dn%7Dif(r.walkTokens)%7Blet%20n%3Dthis.defaults.walkTokens%2Cs%3Dr.walkTokens%3Bi.walkTokens%3Dfunction(a)%7Blet%20l%3D%5B%5D%3Breturn%20l.push(s.call(this%2Ca))%2Cn%26%26(l%3Dl.concat(n.call(this%2Ca)))%2Cl%7D%7Dthis.defaults%3D%7B...this.defaults%2C...i%7D%7D)%2Cthis%7DsetOptions(e)%7Breturn%20this.defaults%3D%7B...this.defaults%2C...e%7D%2Cthis%7Dlexer(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20I.lex(e%2Ct%3F%3Fthis.defaults)%7Dparser(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20D.parse(e%2Ct%3F%3Fthis.defaults)%7DparseMarkdown(e)%7Breturn(t%2Cr)%3D%3E%7Blet%20i%3D%7B...r%7D%2Cn%3D%7B...this.defaults%2C...i%7D%2Cs%3Dthis.onError(!!n.silent%2C!!n.async)%3Bif(this.defaults.async%3D%3D%3D!0%26%26i.async%3D%3D%3D!1)return%20s(new%20Error(%22marked()%3A%20The%20async%20option%20was%20set%20to%20true%20by%20an%20extension.%20Remove%20async%3A%20false%20from%20the%20parse%20options%20object%20to%20return%20a%20Promise.%22))%3Bif(typeof%20t%3E%22u%22%7C%7Ct%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20s(new%20Error(%22marked()%3A%20input%20parameter%20is%20undefined%20or%20null%22))%3Bif(typeof%20t!%3D%22string%22)return%20s(new%20Error(%22marked()%3A%20input%20parameter%20is%20of%20type%20%22%2BObject.prototype.toString.call(t)%2B%22%2C%20string%20expected%22))%3Bif(n.hooks%26%26(n.hooks.options%3Dn%2Cn.hooks.block%3De)%2Cn.async)return(async()%3D%3E%7Blet%20a%3Dn.hooks%3Fawait%20n.hooks.preprocess(t)%3At%2Cl%3Dawait(n.hooks%3Fawait%20n.hooks.provideLexer(e)%3Ae%3FI.lex%3AI.lexInline)(a%2Cn)%2Ch%3Dn.hooks%3Fawait%20n.hooks.processAllTokens(l)%3Al%3Bn.walkTokens%26%26await%20Promise.all(this.walkTokens(h%2Cn.walkTokens))%3Blet%20o%3Dawait(n.hooks%3Fawait%20n.hooks.provideParser(e)%3Ae%3FD.parse%3AD.parseInline)(h%2Cn)%3Breturn%20n.hooks%3Fawait%20n.hooks.postprocess(o)%3Ao%7D)().catch(s)%3Btry%7Bn.hooks%26%26(t%3Dn.hooks.preprocess(t))%3Blet%20a%3D(n.hooks%3Fn.hooks.provideLexer(e)%3Ae%3FI.lex%3AI.lexInline)(t%2Cn)%3Bn.hooks%26%26(a%3Dn.hooks.processAllTokens(a))%2Cn.walkTokens%26%26this.walkTokens(a%2Cn.walkTokens)%3Blet%20l%3D(n.hooks%3Fn.hooks.provideParser(e)%3Ae%3FD.parse%3AD.parseInline)(a%2Cn)%3Breturn%20n.hooks%26%26(l%3Dn.hooks.postprocess(l))%2Cl%7Dcatch(a)%7Breturn%20s(a)%7D%7D%7DonError(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20r%3D%3E%7Bif(r.message%2B%3D%60%0APlease%20report%20this%20to%20https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fmarkedjs%2Fmarked.%60%2Ce)%7Blet%20i%3D%22%3Cp%3EAn%20error%20occurred%3A%3C%2Fp%3E%3Cpre%3E%22%2B%24(r.message%2B%22%22%2C!0)%2B%22%3C%2Fpre%3E%22%3Breturn%20t%3FPromise.resolve(i)%3Ai%7Dif(t)return%20Promise.reject(r)%3Bthrow%20r%7D%7D%7D%2CU%3Dnew%20ri%3Bfunction%20k(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20U.parse(e%2Ct)%7Dk.options%3Dk.setOptions%3Dfunction(e)%7Breturn%20U.setOptions(e)%2Ck.defaults%3DU.defaults%2Cyt(k.defaults)%2Ck%7D%3Bk.getDefaults%3DPe%3Bk.defaults%3DW%3Bk.use%3Dfunction(...e)%7Breturn%20U.use(...e)%2Ck.defaults%3DU.defaults%2Cyt(k.defaults)%2Ck%7D%3Bk.walkTokens%3Dfunction(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20U.walkTokens(
